name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-juodljk-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| My Friends,

First of all, from the bottom of my heart I want to thank you for standing with me in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate. It was indeed an honor to run for public office, but most importantly, to meet folks from all walks of life who love this country and will continue to fight for the freedoms we value. Since August, I’ve been spending a lot of time with my family and have been reminded that there is nothing more important in life than faith and family. Of course, my children miss rolling on the Big Orange RV, but they are certainly happy to have their dad back home.

Elections are tough and not for the weak, and while we came up short, I am so proud of what we accomplished together. The odds we faced were very difficult, but we stretched the campaign to 12 rounds, went toe to toe with a well-funded opponent, and won the hearts of 250,000 Tennesseans all across the state who placed their trust in me. We had a grassroots team second to none, great senior staff leadership, and we kept the campaign clean and focused on the issues. As my daddy would say, “Not bad, not bad at all.”

Our conservative cause remains just as true today, as it did over a year ago when I decided to run for the Senate. The one amazing thing that stands crystal clear after all the television ads and rallies, the child of two immigrants from India, who grew up in rural Tennessee and ran for the United States Senate on the Republican ballot, was able to write a chapter in the book called the American story. We should never lose sight of reaching for the top and capturing our dreams. In the weeks ahead, regardless of what the media and the Democrats try to portray about our country, just remember we are Americans — we make no apologies on who we are and what we stand for because we are the greatest country in the world.

Our way of life is literally on the ballot in November, and now more than ever, it is critical that we stand behind and strongly support our Republican candidates. We must re-elect President Donald Trump, and we must elect Ambassador Bill Hagerty, who has served our state and country well, for the U.S. Senate. Our future is in our own hands, I know you will do your part. For me, this wasn’t my place in time to be in public office, but my resolve is not shaken, and my spirit is not broken, so let’s work together to ensure victory for all Republicans on November 3rd. Our future depends on it.

God Bless,

Dr. Manny Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: More Awesome Stuff, and Some Not So Awesome Stuff To Share
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=5cjV.xN.6Mj5HsrSlQUbUw

Peter

If you have been following the trend, then you probably were able to guess that District 32 was once again home to the largest Freedom Rally in the area this weekend. Over 500 patriots gathered this time in San Dimas for another amazing day to help everyone get through whatever 2020 has dealt them. It has been wild being a part of the most unorthodox campaign season in recent history, but we have still managed to build one of the most significant movements Southern California.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=xhVrlNButx6zx_2ODz9uCA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=xhVrlNButx6zx_2ODz9uCA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=xhVrlNButx6zx_2ODz9uCA

As great as all of this has been, and as stoked as I am about how things are going for the campaign, there are some unfortunate things going on that need to be addressed. First, one of our supporters, an 82 year old man displaying a Joshua Scott for Congress sign and a Trump flag at his house, had a window smashed, and his yard sign stolen. This is neither the first, nor the second act of political violence people associated with our campaign have been victim of. We all know what's going on, and we will never back down. Luckily, Ken and his family are taking it all in stride.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=xhVrlNButx6zx_2ODz9uCA

Now, trespassing, vandalism, and theft are one thing, but let's talk about my young supporters who have been bullied into deleting their social media accounts by their peers, and belittled into silence by their teachers. We have extensive documentation of this. There are public social media accounts whose sole purpose is to dox and ruin the lives of young students. Entire families are being attacked. They are coming for jobs, scholarships, and anything else they can try to destroy. All for supporting the President of the United States. Where are the teachers? Where are the administrators? Where are the leaders? Where is the outrage?! Make no mistake, many of them fully condone these atrocities. Many are complicit. 2020 is about so much more than just an election. It's time to expose these people and protect our families. I am here for you. I am with you.

See you soon!

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=5cjV.xN.6Mj5HsrSlQUbUw

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626)214-5406

Donate

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=xhVrlNButx6zx_2ODz9uCA

Follow:

Follow Me On Facebook

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=skbLKEEzsxsXa.NznLFieg

Follow Me On Twitter

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hHaUan5hiIfBCP.&b=.mTEs_CamO0hvt9KkzigiQ

599 S Barranca Ave

Covina CA 91723

name: =?utf-8?Q?=E2=9C=85_Jon_Ossoff_for_Senate?=
subject: Is Mitch auctioning off the Supreme Court vacancy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Disrespectful doesn't even begin to describe it. |
---
Mitch McConnell has no dignity, friend.

On Friday evening, we were all at a loss for words when we learned of the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Less than 24 hours later, **Mitch McConnell sent an email to his supporters asking them to give him money to help him "fill the vacancy."**

Disrespectful doesn't even begin to describe it. _Mitch is just shy of**auctioning off** a seat on our nation's highest court._

**It's past time to remove Mitch McConnell from power.**

Mitch has no respect for the Supreme Court or the Office of Senate Majority Leader, and he doesn't deserve one more day in power.

That's why it's so important we win this election and take back the Senate this year, friend. **We need elected officials who understand the sanctity of the positions they hold._Mitch McConnell and David Perdue simply don't fit the bill._**

**[Jon Ossoff will lead with dignity and respect in the Senate. Friend, can you chip in a few dollars to help elect Jon and get Mitch McConnell OUT of power?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2ff8/5b2c1286/3ad3131a/25f39b0b/420832159/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_24_mitch_nrsc?refcode=em_2020_09_24_mitch_nrsc")**

subject: Our first debate was a success!
body:

| Friends,

I am just now walking off the debate stage!

I feel confident that voters across the 2nd District respect, appreciate and support my message and see that my campaign favors the pre-pandemic economic growth policies and other approaches we need to create more jobs and income.

We are offering real solutions to combat COVID-19 and future pandemics, increase employment opportunities, and safely reopen the U.S. economy.

[If you agree with our message, please consider contributing $25 to our cause. ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=9435c2d32e&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Team Messner
subject: Fwd: How we defeat Jeanne Shaheen this November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
It’s time to bring common sense back to the Granite State. Read more >>
Peter, Corky wanted to make sure you saw his latest email. He wanted us to get in touch with you again because he needs your help more than ever before to defeat Jeanne Shaheen.

We’re now 39 DAYS away from our FINAL End of Quarter deadline — and we’re still $18,837 short of our online fundraising goal.

We need to throw every single resource we can at Shaheen and the Democrat political machine in order to FLIP this seat, KEEP the Republican majority, and defend the Supreme Court.

**[Please donate what you can now to help us reach our goal before time runs out!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/bb416e3419a0e319c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [Chip in for VICTORY!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/640a13215cf9b6ffc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Thank you to every single patriot who has donated and helped spread the word that Corky is the candidate who can flip this seat in New Hampshire! We can’t win without you!

-Team Messner | |
---
From: Corky Messner
To: All Supporters
Sent: Wednesday, September 24, 2020; 11:02 A.M.
Subject: How we defeat Jeanne Shaheen this November

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/1e7bcd4b4d6a8360c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Peter,

This election is critical to the future of New Hampshire and America — and [**I need your help more than ever before**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/da00db758ebc4c1ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)

My Democrat opponent, Jeanne Shaheen, has been in politics for 44 years. If she was going to make a difference — and if she was going to stand up to the radical left in her own party — wouldn’t she have done so already?

I’m a veteran, an outsider, and a businessman. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I support our president’s America First agenda and, like the president, I know what makes America great.

**Furthermore, I will always vote to confirm pro-Constitution judges and to protect the Supreme Court. We can’t trust Jeanne Shaheen to do the same**.

We’re closer to Election Day than ever before, and now we’re just SIX DAYS out from our FINAL End Of Quarter Fundraising Deadline. Our goal is to raise $30,000 online to keep our ads running — _and we can’t do it without YOU!_

**[Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/e1f8798839716617c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/16897ce860b1a84bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[Chip in for VICTORY!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/2b1b155abe67c29bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
We’ve come a long way, but if we want to reach the finish line and finally retire D.C. Jeanne, we’re going to need every resource we can get.

**There is so much at stake this election. We CANNOT allow the liberals and their chaos to reign**.

**Please make a stand and help me win. Every dollar counts in the fight to beat the Democrats and their far-left agenda**.
[DONATE $100](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/1835d09fa6686c40c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[DONATE $50](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/a969c8ce617572dac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[DONATE $25](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/0b95fbf2f16baa4fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[DONATE $10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/7301d903aaae475dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[DONATE $5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/b3336eb33653c7dac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
We need you more than ever before, Peter. I’m counting on your swift response to help us reach our $30,000 goal.

For our future,

Corky Messner
[DONATE NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/b03c256a3a2a05d0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/ab7fc19fbf5fba1bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/7a6d683b36739a7e/35b0e20311b7cc7ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:

Peter, Exciting news! We're going to be on TV! It's expensive but an important way to reach voters --and my opponent has already been up on tv for a couple of weeks, so we need to make sure voters hear from me too. Especially now that we're just under 40 days until the election! But even sooner than that is our final End-of-Quarter deadline on September 30th where we make some key decisions. **[Right now, we're coming up a little short of where we need to be to keep ads on the air and our digital media up through Election Day. Between now and the 30th, we need to raise $11,755 exactly. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/122_VnbxA19sbVIELQyXWvxlOu1rSYBP0gnRux0qLrI=/3sRUD4TwF2xDQoSZeDmhIjHENkUY4fiu3nP6q1faipw=?refcode=septeoq1&amount=20)[If you can, a donation of $20 today can help us close the gap.](https://act.myngp.com/el/122_VnbxA19sbVIELQyXWvxlOu1rSYBP0gnRux0qLrI=/b94Hg8gNXhMU9DdfAe1pYQny2ET0z7ldko7SEkakv7Q=?refcode=septeoq1&amount=20)** Especially now, due to the pandemic-- when face to face voter interaction isn't safe-- these are the most effective ways to share my message with voters. I hope you can help us make sure we're able to keep communicating. Thank you for all your support. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Exciting news! We're going to be on TV! It's expensive but an important way to reach voters --and my opponent has already been up on tv for a couple of weeks, so we need to make sure voters hear from me too. Especially now that we're just under 40 days until the election! But even sooner than that is our final End-of-Quarter deadline on September 30th where we make some key decisions. Especially now, due to the pandemic-- when face to face voter interaction isn't safe-- these are the most effective ways to share my message with voters. I hope you can help us make sure we're able to keep communicating. Thank you for all your support. Sincerely, Please note: Our mailing address changed! If you'd like to send a check, please send it to: Friends of Betsy Rader 626 Franklin Ave PO Box #801 Kent, OH 44240 * = = = = | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader 626 Franklin Ave PO Box #801 Kent OH 44240 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =_

This election is just too important to leave anything up to chance. **To do that, we have to hit our $75,000 End-of-Quarter goal. clean_body: | = | | Team, we’ve got less than 40 days left to win the most important election of our lifetimes. So much is on the line — our planet, our healthcare, our rights. We can’t let up even one day until November 3rd. But we also have to make sure we’re equipped to make the most of the time left, or we could wake up the day after Election Day and wonder what might have been. This election is just too important to leave anything up to chance. To do that, we have to hit our $75,000 End-of-Quarter goal. This is our largest and most ambitious goal yet, so we need to ask —= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = We don’t want to look back and realize that we could have done more if we only had the resources. Our goals keep us on track to run an efficient and effective campaign ― but if we don’t meet our End-of-Quarter goal, there’s no time left to catch up. | | Hey folks, it's Josh. **I’m coming to you today because we’re facing down our last end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the campaign. Simply put, we _need_ to hit our targets to win this race.** Asking you to chip in your hard-earned dollars is one of my least favorite parts about campaigning. But the truth is, we’re going to win this race by matching our opponent’s dark-money fundraising with thousands of regular folks chipping in a few bucks at a time. [_**Can you chip in towards our end-of-quarter goal so we have the resources we need to win on November 3?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19543328/253513031/-1729872895?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200925EOQ3_JH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDRhMjY5OC00N2ZmLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EB_fZmy6MyWClUaMro5GmXIwnx8Z-KE0PlpTW32mz1A=) When grassroots supporters chip in, it allows us to reject corporate contributions. It means we can run a campaign focused on what people in our district need. It means we’re not beholden to corporations or special interests. name: Sean Herring
subject: Re: Standing in the way
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?refcode=092520)
| | Friend, Did you see our email yesterday? Mike Pence and Ivanka Trump were here to distract and divide us so they can turn Minnesota red this November. **We know that visits from this administration signal what 's to come: more money and more attention.** We need to be ready. Will you make a grassroots donation to our organization today? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?refcode=092520) **Minnesota residents can be refunded $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year through the Minnesota PCR program.** Let's win big this November. Thank you, **Sean Herring** Campaign Manager Minnesota House DFL Campaign \---------- Forwarded message --------- Friend, Today, Mike Pence and Ivanka Trump returned to Minnesota to host a "Cops for Trump" event in Minneapolis -- where George Floyd was murdered and just a day after justice for Breonna Taylor was denied. Pence and Ivanka talked about the civil unrest, but glossed over the systemic issues that caused it in the first place. To add insult to injury, Minnesota Republicans have repeatedly stood in the way of much needed funding that businesses need to rebuild and Trump even denied us disaster relief funding as "punishment." Minnesotans know better. We see through this attempt to distract and divide. If we want real change and real recovery, we need to grow our majority in the Minnesota House, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House -- that all starts here at the local level. Will you help us bring our country together from the grassroots? Your contribution today will help us make strategic plans as we head into the homestretch: _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=092520) [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=092520) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=092520) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=092520) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=092520) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Trump and Minnesota Republicans abandoned Minnesota when we needed help and are exploiting our pain for the benefit of their campaign -- and that's something we can never forget. Together, we can reject Trump's politics of division and come together to build a better future where all Minnesotans are safe in their communities, no exceptions. Thank you, House DFL Team [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/zdn7GKaiD7TrMnMz1ITNTJTVpHAXKjanI994XkZPhPQ=/ZP9wjtV3YTfAPcf-QnBFheX65IEZjcsTQUWniYrZ0Tw=?refcode=092520)

Don’t you want to meet your favorite President? President Trump invited you to meet him at his event in New Jersey, but when he saw the most recent list of Patriots who entered, he noticed your name was MISSING. Why is that? You’ve always been one of his TOP supporters, so NOT entering just isn’t like you. The President can’t imagine having anyone else there as his VIP guest, so he asked us to reach out to give you another chance to enter. This could be your LAST CHANCE to meet the President of the United States before the Election, so don’t wait. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT and you’ll automatically be entered to win a trip to meet President Trump in New Jersey. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT Remember, if you win: - We’ll cover your flight - We’ll make sure you have a very nice place to stay - You’ll get to bring a guest of your choice - You’ll get VIP ACCESS - And, you’ll even get to take a photo together. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. by texting “JERSEY” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 23, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 26, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). name: Francys Johnson, Former President of the Georgia NAACP
subject: This video says it all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
Friend,

WATCH THE VIDEO >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue]

“It didn’t start here, but it ends here.”

As a child, I remember reading the words of Frederick Douglass: "there is no progress without struggle." That immortal wisdom came from the yearning soul of a man so desperate to see change in his bitterly divided society that he used his time, talent, and treasure to secure the liberation of millions in chattel slavery. Waiting for someone else to act was not an option.

Friend, we cannot afford to wait on someone else to act any longer.

The current leadership in Georgia and in Washington are not concerned with real justice. You see that in the willingness of the U.S. Senate to ram through a Supreme Court Justice even while the voters are already voting. You see that in the courtrooms across America, where there is always a technicality, a lesser charge, a deal—each time, with justice denied. The America that generations since Douglass have fought to secure is now at stake.

The Georgia Blue Project’s mission is to galvanize voters and make sure when they turn out, they vote for Democrats up and down the ticket. We can flip Georgia blue and, by doing so, change the White House, the Senate majority in Washington and even break the Republican stranglehold on the Georgia State Legislature. When we vote all the way down the ballot, we can elect a new cadre of reformers to the local offices from sheriff to district attorney so that we can pass overdue police reform.

Friend, we cannot do this without your help. Can you TAKE ACTION now, and chip in $26—one dollar for every race we are targeting with ads from now until November—to help me accomplish this goal??

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Donate $26 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $500 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate Another Amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane_other=true&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

The time is now. Thank you for taking action now to flip Georgia blue and usher in better government that truly represents and recognizes everyone.

—Francys Johnson

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane_other=true&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Georgia Blue PRoject
PO Box 60558
Philadelphia, PA 19145
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/d7875cbc-4cff-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc/aa683ec3-4cff-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhNjgzZWMzLTRjZmYtZWExMS05NmY1LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mRcjzhKDmgP0iiAN8Xa2GWA_qImoV3dY445H0QIPg2A=&id=102705779 .

name: Rev. Tony Suarez
subject: Spanish Voting Resources to Share
body:
| | Saludos Peter, I serve as the Chief Operating Officer of the _National Hispanic Christian Leadership Conference_ , the country’s largest Hispanic Christian organization, serving more than 42,000 congregations in the United States. As a new board member for My Faith Votes, I’m honored to be connecting the work of My Faith Votes by providing Hispanic Christians with critical faith-based voting resources. If you attend a Spanish speaking church, have a Spanish speaking ministry in your local church or if you know someone who does, please share these Spanish voting resources:
* [ Platform Guides](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iWpC2DEzv9E1TzWlgwOLur_oQQUeQcfaqavA4pEdgZUw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=1)
* [PSA videos and Interviews](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRbdecRZLqFwnRa55jcwBSbnEVjmxViGUG-lMbzSAzcfL-Vm60C_JNv-teL483wAQwYBq4I6Ovohx6X66GTCJe6F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=2)
* [Family Devotional on Voting](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iX-PObmLDrNIkQdXv6uLuyZa2uY4WeOS5bjgPC7Wod9i0cdJWmpTyT0vFufWM3eayGOEGhpMccWpIlEU8jfn75I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=3)
* [Ballot Guides for every election giving comprehensive, nonpartisan information about the candidates and referendums on your ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=4).

These materials are free to download and share at any time! I implore you to think and pray about who you could share these materials with. There are 40 million Christians who will not vote unless fellow believers urge them to do so. They will throw away their opportunity to seek the welfare of their cities, states, and our country (Jeremiah 29:7). As my mentor Rev. Samuel Rodriguez says, it’s not about the agenda of the donkey or the elephant, it’s about the agenda of The Lamb. It’s up to Christians to protect and advance a biblical worldview. As members of the body of Christ and also as Americans, it's time for all of us to pray fervently for our country, think biblically about the issues, and do everything within our power to help Christians vote. Join me and utilize these helpful materials. God Bless You, Rev. Tony Suarez
My Faith Votes Board Member
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=5) _**P.S.** We’re continually adding additional Spanish resources. Keep up to date on our website or on our social media pages for more information._
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=6)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200925com01&n=11)

name: Senator Tom Cotton
subject: The House’s strongest defender of police?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
Dangerous rioting is spreading across our country. That’s why I’m taking a stand today - and making a big endorsement. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4a0917c911534f2f95aa81b063559ee4&_e=6z-Tuh7ajdwdFDFfRCxP9PhNKuYHMRLbJJB1EsKtpaxScgwVuadQ0k0lBoDr9kaSdQBMtrNJEQtBWYLkZDRog555ttUc2KvF_6zPAFR004XLWvTpVyUXChd1PmyeQR1BYAtGRJZsQ51C1NgsdrynlzpDvHyPw0yS-4Eat8H8j__Sc8049XYdZ-jpr70y0paRXwmsq-zuFS3UaLlGg7q56kiDSqsURAVqxnytLArQ8ejPO_bwGfGKXGy7b1zXba5i4sowFSdvEe7cPoIYfXy0FYxifl-xuHm7btfTSWBsPOrVUCf7du8OI82DsdaOKKE4JlwEd8rZ9jcXZ2T3TNMXhWArKgnGYOsEaKQOmMzCtGDbc0nTyC8PaPBSI7UnZH0Ti5d3SQyZ5Uu-2rJxOWFiW04HTlrC2Dbw3GtLvmEL42QWcwZd_v7zqluGhcnjucG33V1Fpu_S_3OVT3EbjdAYeNsJfDW3hnao1XqyNBah0GdG_8cMqI4r1AcN3ds0UGVa)
|
---
Friend –

First, we saw violent riots. Then, those riots turned deadly. And now, we're seeing direct, violent attacks on police like the horrific shooting in Los Angeles.
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4a0917c911534f2f95aa81b063559ee4&_e=6z-Tuh7ajdwdFDFfRCxP9PhNKuYHMRLbJJB1EsKtpaxScgwVuadQ0k0lBoDr9kaSdQBMtrNJEQtBWYLkZDRog555ttUc2KvF_6zPAFR004XLWvTpVyUXChd1PmyeQR1BYAtGRJZsQ51C1NgsdrynlzpDvHyPw0yS-4Eat8H8j__Sc8049XYdZ-jpr70y0paRXwmsq-zuFS3UaLlGg7q56kiDSqsURAVqxnytLArQ8ejPO_bwGfGKXGy7b1zXba5i4sowFSdvEe7cPoIYfXy0FYxifl-xuHm7btfTSWBsPOqm01w2wF9ImU7XzftBc6yvOKANAvJu5tMJtl8PbyaE9NkyBQVsK7ZZVTa4yIU38BTsfaRjxtaq524M6cMNlp5TXDi_dp3oN0QS538bZn_U4WD4nt0Vw53U-bYTluDtUoWYou616cCMdzgykafSLCGyOH5rfsRfUvr9NTU6-5AL-FyhtX6RHfBKLnbFthWy3uiC_OdVe7_o320NlI-tHRL9)
_Photo courtesy of Sky News_
|
---
Friend, this is beyond unacceptable.

And you know what makes it worse?

_**All over America, our police forces are watching their leaders turn their back on them.**_

It has led to funding cuts, mass resignations of officers, and - yes - horrifying spikes in violence in cities across America.

**But some leaders are standing up for our law enforcement. Leaders like Matt Mowers.**

**That’s why I'm writing to you today to announce my full and total endorsement of Matt Mowers for Congress.**
|
---

I could list out so many reasons he's a great choice to send to Congress - he’s strong on the 2nd Amendment, wants to cut taxes for working families and small businesses, and supports building the wall, to name a few - but let me tell you a story instead.

Here's how he flipped not one but TWO unions in his home state from D to R because of his leadership:

In 2018, two Manchester police unions endorsed Matt’s opponent - liberal Democrat Chris Pappas. Pappas vowed to be an independent voice in Washington, breaking from his party when necessary and working with President Trump to deliver real results for New Hampshire’s law enforcement community.

But as it goes with so many Democrats, all of Pappas’ promises turned to dust once he made it to Congress. Instead of working across the aisle, he voted with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time. And when violent riots broke out and cops in his home district were getting attacked, Pappas refused to condemn the mobs.

**Chris Pappas turned his back on Granite State cops - and Matt Mowers boldly called him out for it.**

|

**Matt Mowers fiercely backs the blue. That’s why the Manchester Police Patrolman’s Association and the Manchester Association of Police Supervisors endorsed him.**

This is the kind of voice we need in Washington - someone who actually leads when they see the right thing to do. Someone who motivates people to join our coalition. Someone who takes the Make America Great Again movement - and makes it even greater.

Matt Mowers won't abandon the rule of law. Matt Mowers won't abandon our law enforcement officers. And, friend, Matt Mowers won’t abandon us.

He’s a true patriot and I’m honored to support him today. Please, join with me - help me take a stand in support of our law enforcement by joining his campaign: **[https://secure.winred.com/mowers-for-congress/direct-1554153/](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=4a0917c911534f2f95aa81b063559ee4&_e=6z-Tuh7ajdwdFDFfRCxP9PhNKuYHMRLbJJB1EsKtpaxScgwVuadQ0k0lBoDr9kaSdQBMtrNJEQtBWYLkZDRog555ttUc2KvF_6zPAFR004XLWvTpVyUXChd1PmyeQR1BYAtGRJZsQ51C1NgsdrynlzpDvHyPw0yS-4Eat8H8j__Sc8049XYdZ-jpr70y0paRXwmsq-zuFS3UaLlGg7q56kiDSqsURAVqxnytLArQ8ejPO_bwGfGKXGy7b1zXba5i4sowFSdvEe7cPoIYfXy0FYxifl-xuHm7btfTSWBsPOrZV4kLKGGl-RkZlHMoRxDs_z0qxrXywdoy18TYsYCeg-1gOI0ekCNJ1ihsO2siefA7tEi7TGLppLEOjyeCdywzje57ixmtJGvjobPEtRjXqEvGiHF7aZc_G9ZmDITbdFAPfo0MiNvl-2_lif2RfaO7E_hYVoDKygrBqbC6ISeo8IJZCMXA5uoUiwQ2nkzr6obZz8jHnnkhpNMHVVYC48e3)**

Senator Tom Cotton (R-AR)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/688f45f71267/were-on-the-air?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Last week, we put our very first ad on the air!

We put it up just in time — yesterday was the first day of early voting and the first batch of mail ballots were sent to voters all across the state. If you haven’t seen our ad yet, check it out [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3b82a29164&e=140a9b81e7).

**Now that it’s running, we need help keeping it up through Election Day.**

[Can I count on you to chip in and help us stay on the air](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0b48f35c81&e=140a9b81e7)[?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e74b120c4e&e=140a9b81e7)

It is critical that we get our message out to the voters of IL-16 so they know that our opponent has serious competition this cycle - his days of sitting in his DC office, disconnected from this district are over. **The voters are ready for leadership with bold, effective solutions to the problems that keep them up at night and Dani is ready to fight like hell to get it to them. **

TV is old hat for my opponent. He’s backed by corporate PACs and special interest groups, and they’ll continue to pour money into his campaign coffers as long as he continues to vote their way.

Small dollar donors like you were the reason we were able to shoot our ad and get it on the air in the first place, so I know I can depend on you to help me keep our ad on TV.

[**Click here to contribute so that we can stay on the air and flip the 16th.**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a25f10fa18&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Team Dani

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19550572/253543211/-1332358803?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=391288e0-5bff-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEyODhlMC01YmZmLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zDSwWbzN6XeUHvLtmU0dT9W6Xc8CR3fksoWkI6qQnE=) Friend,

In just a few days, our campaign is facing our most critical fundraising benchmark of the entire race: **Our final end-of-quarter FEC deadline before Election Day. **

**We need to raise $30,000 before we enter this final month of the campaign, so I’m coming to you directly. If you have been waiting to make your first contribution, there has never been a more critical time to step up.**

[**Will you chip in now to help us meet our final end-of-quarter goal of the election and move into the final month of this campaign in the strongest position possible?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19550573/253543212/-1332358803?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=391288e0-5bff-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEyODhlMC01YmZmLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zDSwWbzN6XeUHvLtmU0dT9W6Xc8CR3fksoWkI6qQnE=) | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19550574/253543213/-1332358803?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=391288e0-5bff-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTEyODhlMC01YmZmLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zDSwWbzN6XeUHvLtmU0dT9W6Xc8CR3fksoWkI6qQnE=)

**_Let me explain:_** This _final_ FEC quarterly fundraising deadline will set the stage for the last month of the campaign. We need to ensure that our public fundraising report exhibits just how strong this grassroots team is -- especially as special interests rush in to prop up Scott Perry and influence our election.

**Friend, the next few weeks will shape the future of our country, and so much of that hinges on what happens right here in PA-10.**

Our race will have implications up and down the ballot, and if we’re going to elect leaders who will protect health care, voting rights, and restore faith in our democratic systems, it all starts in South Central PA.

**[I’m counting on you to step up now to help us meet this moment and win this race, because there’s simply too much at stake to leave anything on the table. If you have been waiting to make your first contribution, there has never been a more critical time to step up. = | = Let me explain: This final FEC quarterly fundraising deadline will set the stage for the last month of the campaign. Friend, the next few weeks will shape the future of our country, and so much of that hinges on what happens right here in PA-10. clean_body: Here we go, Friend -- With less than 40 days remaining in this vital election, I need your help to fund my final push to victory. That’s why today, I’m launching our FREEDOM FIGHTERS FINAL FIGHT FUND. This starts with one goal: reaching the most important fundraising deadline of the entire campaign: our September 30 th end-of-quarter deadline. If we’re on top when the deadline passes, we will have HUGE momentum heading into the homestretch of the campaign, encouraging patriots nationwide to get involved and showing the D.C. Democrats that Virginia conservatives are ready for the fight. Abigail Spanberger has raked in huge money from Nancy Pelosi’s nationwide fundraising machine, and she repays the favor by falling in line with the Pelosi agenda of gun bans, socialism, and open borders. We can push back on the big-pocketed Northern Virginia–D.C. donors and far-left special interest groups flooding my opponent’s campaign withHUGE contributions. Join the Freitas Freedom Fighters today, help defeat Abigail Spanberger, and bring us one step closer to getting rid of Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. Thank you for standing with me for American values and freedom and fighting back against radical socialists who threaten our Constitution. For liberty! Nick Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: "Give the American people a voice" - John Cornyn, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
His current stance on the Supreme Court has completely changed.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0a/7f51f7bc/45b649f6/4efa55fd/3868672627/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0a/7f51f7bc/45b649f6/4efa55fc/3868672627/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200925.1nd__2177__&amount=10")
---
It's shameful,
More than 200 days before the election in 2016, Sen. Cornyn argued that the American people should have a voice in who would be appointed to a life-long term on the Supreme Court. But now, just 39 days from Election Day 2020, he thinks that he and his Washington cronies should have total control.

He doesn't want the American people to have a voice -- HE wants to be the voice.

Sen. Cornyn has been corrupted by power and influence in Washington. It took him 2 minutes to throw away any remaining integrity he had and fall in line with McConnell. If we can't trust Sen. Cornyn to keep his word on something as important as a lifetime appointment to the highest court in the land, then no wonder we can't trust him to EVER support the interests of Texans.

**When MJ tells you that she'll do something, you bet she'll follow through.** **[Help us elect a senator who values her word.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f0a/7f51f7bc/45b649f6/4efa55fc/3868672627/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200925.1nd__2177__&amount=10")**

name: Allen Chen
subject: changing what's possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
We’re on the precipice of making history in Texas, friend.

We can win the fight to expand access to affordable health care for millions of Americans, and we can restore integrity and decency to our government.

We can flip Texas blue.

This is possible thanks to the support of our grassroots movement, friend -- you will be what carries us through the finish line.

Flip Texas Blue! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ac_all&amount=25

Friend, Over the past few years, TX-22 has dramatically changed -- and with it, the scope of what is possible here.
We have full confidence that we will make history and flip Texas blue, starting with our own district.

Friend, Sri’s grassroots movement has activated new swaths of voters and mobilized new people to fight for what we deserve: Access to affordable health care, an economy that works for all of us, and the restoration of America on the world stage.

And together, we can make it happen -- but only with your support.

We’re facing the last FEC quarterly fundraising deadline before this election, and it’s our last chance to show our district and the rest of the country that the momentum is on our side -- the kind of momentum that can make history and flip Texas blue.

Can we count on your support? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ac_all&amount=25

New polls show that Joe Biden is down just 2 points in Texas, friend! If Biden carries Texas, the math is clear: Democrats WILL win the White House.

But Joe Biden and MJ Hegar cannot flip Texas blue if Sri loses in TX-22.

Help us step up to meet this challenge and deliver for Democrats up and down the ballot, friend.

Chip in now >> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ac_all&amount=25

Thanks,
Allen

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ac_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.25_b1_ac_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. body:
| | | Derek, I’m sorry to keep emailing you about Donald Trump’s rally tonight in Newport News, but it’s important. In a week where we mourned the deaths of 200,000 Americans to COVID-19, it’s appalling that Donald Trump is putting the lives of Virginians at risk by holding a super-spreader hate rally in one of our communities. **[His recklessness is another urgent call to action for Virginia Democrats. With only hours left until Trump arrives, will you help us reach our $20,000 rapid response goal before midnight? We’re still $7,500 short and I could sure use your help.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61GjcXYfP2cAqgIYZQ_GE49y7vTDvVFGWnJMRRXXNvMWjOKMVTLQrn59n-Dnm3Z0GoPAhxFF_VpHwNDapB8-30QdMqXk9XYehvADY6w1sEiBkda-uvukOVof_DLdEUc_aSD7x2iIUxJjnKBkMGm_NlXcfk4deX3hnkZxb8xrsfFGL7etUoMm9MyJQ_KDGlfDccj6bBQWCBfjU8_bQjTaZJpFuVLsPkrioPsjR_IUs7ILFjcQCs2iHFd4vr3Z_f2kXQZ5gEiyw8aaahFPYQ4FABKko8KZnK8VtOI6CNcms6sLw6giJeXrgtZcTyjmhRysxpO2MKmwFkDM8S0clc2h7Rbw/35h/nR7t3HglQ9ifjYGwueisMg/h0/DdpEoZrt2IDQ4ZtIN47SwP7feUYWoIT49Tngh80e0Dc)** We know how important Virginia is winning Congress, the White House and saving the Supreme Court. | The President and I had a great conversation regarding the future of Florida. He loves Florida and understands the importance of keeping Florida RED!
It has never been more important that we all work together to ensure a bright future for Florida in November.
With the radical liberals in D.C. inciting violence across the country and the "Squad" pushing for socialism and a second impeachment hoax, now more than ever we must make our voices heard.
I know what it is like to lose everything due to failed policies, and I also know how hard we, as Floridians, work to keep a roof over our heads and food on the table. This is why I am passionate about my fight for FL-03 and my fight for all of you.
My mission is to protect your Constitutional rights, take down the Squad, build back our economy stronger than ever, and SAVE America!

clean_body: Here is the good and the bad. This is important. | | | | | | | "CHIP IN" | | Friend, We have news. Both good and bad. The Good: A generous donor agreed to match our donations if we can raise just $5k in the next 24 hours! The Bad: We can’t do this without YOU! Can you give right now to ensure we meet this goal? Your donation is going straight to the mothers who deserve a place in office. With just weeks until the election, it’s never been more crucial that we meet this goal. Peter,
_**This is isn’t good.**_ Former President Barack Obama just endorsed my opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House, Ben Ray Lujan.

He’s asking Democrat donors across the country to pour money into our race to stop our conservative grassroots movement. _**We need your help**_ to fight back against this huge influx of out of state donations Ben Ray is receiving from New York and California Democrats. Ben Ray thinks that if he plays their political games in DC, instead of fighting for New Mexicans, the super wealthy liberal elites will bail him out when it comes time to run for office.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, This is isn’t good. Former President Barack Obama just endorsed my opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House, Ben Ray Lujan. He’s asking Democrat donors across the country to pour money into our race to stop our conservative grassroots movement. We need your help to fight back against this huge influx of out of state donations Ben Ray is receiving from New York and California Democrats. If you can, | As a career politician, Ben Ray has been setting aside New Mexico priorities to get cozy with party leaders so he can take advantage of opportunities like this. Ben Ray thinks that if he plays their political games in DC, instead of fighting for New Mexicans, the super wealthy liberal elites will bail him out when it comes time to run for office. New Mexico needs to show Ben Ray that we will not be sold out and we can’t be bought. | | | Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Former President Barack Obama is pushing Democrats across the country to pour money into this race to stop our grassroots movement. name: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
subject: Got pre-debate plans? Join me, CAP's John Podesta, and Sunrise Movement's Evan Weber
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Here's something to brighten up your Monday.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY) Friend, the first debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump is coming up next week! To me, this sounds like the perfect opportunity for our next installment of Policy + Pints, Evergreen's exclusive1 virtual BYOB2 happy hour, where I'll talk with policy experts about their hopes for the debate and what's at stake for the climate in this election. **[Will you join me on Monday, September 28, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET -- the night before the debate 3 \-- for our next installment of Policy + Pints?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=3&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY)** | [RSVP ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=4&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY)
---
Last month, I got to speak with two ~~fellow nerds~~ very special guests, Leah Stokes and Julian Brave NoiseCat, at our first-ever Policy + Pints event. We were so pleased to share the experience with hundreds of you!
And we've confirmed two heavy hitters in the climate fight for Monday's debate preview:
* **John Podesta** , founder of Center for American Progress and former Counselor to President Obama
* **Evan Weber** , co-founder and political director of Sunrise Movement

We'll sip drinks and talk through questions like: What questions do we want to hear moderators ask the candidates on climate? How should candidates respond to and defend climate plans? How does the Supreme Court vacancy affect the climate fight?
**[You won't want to miss this. RSVP today to join John, Evan, and me for Policy + Pints on Monday, September 28, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=5&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY)**
Thanks,
Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen Action
[RSVP ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/958?t=6&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY)
---
1 Disclaimer: Actually not exclusive at all. Please forward this invite to any friends and family!
2 Go ahead, get creative with your beverage choice: Last time, Leah sipped tea, while Julian indulged in some maple water. And yeah, I had a beer.
3 This is also the end of Yom Kippur, for those who observe. Hope you have an easy and meaningful fast!
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=3202%2E53494%2ErgBXcY). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

clean_body: Here's something to brighten up your Monday. | Friend, the first debate between Joe Biden and Donald Trump is coming up next week! To me, this sounds like the perfect opportunity for our next installment of Policy + Pints, Evergreen's exclusive1 virtual BYOB2 happy hour, where I'll talk with policy experts about their hopes for the debate and what's at stake for the climate in this election. | Last month, I got to speak with two ~~fellow nerds~~ very special guests, Leah Stokes and Julian Brave NoiseCat, at our first-ever Policy + Pints event. We were so pleased to share the experience with hundreds of you! And we've confirmed two heavy hitters in the climate fight for Monday's debate preview: John Podesta , founder of Center for American Progress and former Counselor to President Obama Evan Weber , co-founder and political director of Sunrise Movement We'll sip drinks and talk through questions like: What questions do we want to hear moderators ask the candidates on climate? How should candidates respond to and defend climate plans? How does the Supreme Court vacancy affect the climate fight? Thanks, Maggie Thomas Political Director, Evergreen Action 1 Disclaimer: Actually not exclusive at all. Please forward this invite to any friends and family! 2 Go ahead, get creative with your beverage choice: Last time, Leah sipped tea, while Julian indulged in some maple water. And yeah, I had a beer. 3 This is also the end of Yom Kippur, for those who observe. Hope you have an easy and meaningful fast!

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fill the seat, Biden and Harris aren’t fooling anyone, Trump sets record straight for CDC
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20269-dfefd9e1ec2740f0b3b604fe61ed4fbd/74/635/5345b2e2-9d63-4f66-ba6f-6409bb168034)** Following the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, immediately the question was asked, what happens now? With the 2020 election less than 60 days away, Democrats immediately began pushing for any nomination to take place after the election. Presumably hoping that, in November, Joe Biden would be victorious and able to nominate a liberal justice to the court. They attempted to push this idea with threats of court packing, violence, and to “blow up the entire system.” But Mitch McConnell, undeterred, immediately came out and set the record straight, saying that the United States Senate would hold a vote on President Trump’s nominee to succeed Justice Ginsburg. Shortly thereafter, President Trump announced that he would be naming his nominee at the end of the week. After all, when the Senate is controlled by the same party as the White House, a nomination and vote have occurred during an election year dozens of times in our nation’s history. Just like that, the process of filling the newly vacant seat had begun. While many protested the move, this is undoubtedly the right call. The President is elected to serve for 4 years. Not 2 years, not 3 years, not 3 years and 6 months, but 4 years. President Trump has every right to fill the vacancy on the court -- history, precedent and the rule of law are on his side. And this weekend, we will officially find out who the President is nominating to the highest court in the land. | |

Logan, Ohio, where police officers are apparently now tasing mothers with asthma for not wearing a protective mask in a sparsely filled section of bleachers at an outdoor middle school football game.
**[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjY5LWRmZWZkOWUxZWMyNzQwZjBiM2I2MDRmZTYxZWQ0ZmJk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%&K=hB7u7sh_bSjqBso0IBQekw)**

Once again, President Trump is giving unelected bureaucrats, who think they run the nation, a lesson in American constitutional governance.

clean_body: Following the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, immediately the question was asked, what happens now? With the 2020 election less than 60 days away, Democrats immediately began pushing for any nomination to take place after the election. Presumably hoping that, in November, Joe Biden would be victorious and able to nominate a liberal justice to the court. They attempted to push this idea with threats of court packing, violence, and to “blow up the entire system.” But Mitch McConnell, undeterred, immediately came out and set the record straight, saying that the United States Senate would hold a vote on President Trump’s nominee to succeed Justice Ginsburg. Shortly thereafter, President Trump announced that he would be naming his nominee at the end of the week. After all, when the Senate is controlled by the same party as the White House, a nomination and vote have occurred during an election year dozens of times in our nation’s history. Just like that, the process of filling the newly vacant seat had begun. While many protested the move, this is undoubtedly the right call. The President is elected to serve for 4 years. Not 2 years, not 3 years, not 3 years and 6 months, but 4 years. President Trump has every right to fill the vacancy on the court -- history, precedent and the rule of law are on his side. And this weekend, we will officially find out who the President is nominating to the highest court in the land. | | Logan, Ohio, where police officers are apparently now tasing mothers with asthma for not wearing a protective mask in a sparsely filled section of bleachers at an outdoor middle school football game. | This week, as our nation was once again plagued by violence, riots, and anti-police rhetoric, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris tried to position themselves as the ticket that could restore law and order to our nation. Not only that, but they took their glaring hypocrisy a step further, by claiming to support the same police they were demonizing weeks before. Begging the question, when it comes to supporting the police, do Joe Biden and Kamala Harris think we don’t have memories? Just who do Joe Biden and Kamala Harris think they are, anyway? Apparently, they think they’re people living in a world where no one else has a memory... | Conservative political commentator and former Secret Service agent Dan Bongino shocked fans Tuesday with an announcement that he has been diagnosed with a tumor in his neck. | Once again, President Trump is giving unelected bureaucrats, who think they run the nation, a lesson in American constitutional governance. When the CDC started developing a habit of pushing its own, unfounded narrative during the COVID-19 pandemic, the Trump Administration set the record straight for them. The COVID-19 pandemic has catapulted the CDC into the spotlight, with Americans tuning into the CDC’s announcements in ways not seen before. This is the environment that corrupt, win-at-all-costs Democrat politicians have encouraged and nurtured. It’s disgusting. **_“. . . complete and total endorsement . . .”_** _President Donald J. Trump, September 14 th, 2020_ Friends, **I was honored to receive President Donald Trump’s “complete and total endorsement” for my campaign.** [**JOIN THE PRESIDENT**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a1fc400a840b4bf1915a7c9627cc4160&_e=qlF18Jx24mO5jcT6PfxdYnVxlTeF65d6emU7r_x_gtw5dJAmAOUX9MT0InbY8xZjczVerMIfOllj7jRpVCWlYHd9fCBOy1m3SsaZwMeijndjfD6FeLAx-j2mOlPMwXsZbBOqgPZRqYnEEGvTVs-N0gOhTjgulmUCwG65lAjp_BjuANut6VNmmAZf4VnXLFxij37wWfnoWQdisXc_ApVvHT_657kjePDcyhNU8gtIz42lNYwvea7wAmhlezHQzjqV94hcZhjBW7KHDlR-MFmxoaTFbFSqTs-Af0LF62QaknmsBqpRzgHyXT3qkplTR2t_iGn8o-fx1_zw-APbYZ-p0CvaTorvCj-B7x7fakVwkVQeA72FdF2eLGvRRGqyH7onZNn9DY2DPT6evObLPMFNRj_6PytduFkpXsfo7hJXcAMDVtMMHCBN-2fZgAyrG4XkpnroB8IeLBRa6_tSwkxYaA%3D%3D) It’s an honor to know President Trump trusts me to work with him in Washington, fighting for Arizona families and defending jobs, borders, and freedom for the citizens of our great country. **_And it couldn’t have come at a better time._** With just a few weeks to Election Day, _**now**_ is the time to fight for our God-given rights guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution. **[I’m proud to have President Trump on my team, but can I count on you as well?](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a1fc400a840b4bf1915a7c9627cc4160&_e=qlF18Jx24mO5jcT6PfxdYnVxlTeF65d6emU7r_x_gtw5dJAmAOUX9MT0InbY8xZjczVerMIfOllj7jRpVCWlYHd9fCBOy1m3SsaZwMeijndjfD6FeLAx-j2mOlPMwXsZbBOqgPZRqYnEEGvTVs-N0gOhTjgulmUCwG65lAjp_BjuANut6VNmmAZf4VnXLFxij37wWfnoWQdisXc_ApVvHT_657kjePDcyhNU8gtIz407SRwPtsezB_m-R6CYfYJ3SAF568GZ_27S_thixrZk2_gwn1326O59TrO3whvw2h-fnmgQ7SV0SzuvYmKIwf-fNoedP1KK2uCZ8k1YFlJwSB9bf-te_-VQTjqT2qUYLp38WaWDfWTjgKVANrCiS50zEf0HvD9eOTeXtXqiDBZ5aPdl9BXFKaulghEoputgKi0apvg8dWctFT6Tfsj_e_y3eQKEv17-tsNE6zHZrnq7zw%3D%3D)** **This is important,** friend. We are approaching the most important fundraising deadline of the entire campaign: **the LAST end-of-quarter FEC deadline on September 30 th.** This final deadline is absolutely vital because Democrats and their liberal media allies use this financial report to craft a narrative about which candidates are **_“picking up steam”_** and which are _**“falling behind.”**_ **[Contribute ASAP to help crush our final end-of-quarter fundraising goal and head into October with a full head of steam>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a1fc400a840b4bf1915a7c9627cc4160&_e=qlF18Jx24mO5jcT6PfxdYnVxlTeF65d6emU7r_x_gtw5dJAmAOUX9MT0InbY8xZjczVerMIfOllj7jRpVCWlYHd9fCBOy1m3SsaZwMeijndjfD6FeLAx-j2mOlPMwXsZbBOqgPZRqYnEEGvTVs-N0gOhTjgulmUCwG65lAjp_BjuANut6VNmmAZf4VnXLFxij37wWfnoWQdisXc_ApVvHT_657kjePDcyhNU8gtIz407SRwPtsezB_m-R6CYfYJ3TYp-XHzVSIAFeoEUg925ZYEn6nk8KUpkkFXeFzC8pwCBVuIcOh4At-gSDpkuRH1EQV_S1sBHNf29mhBg5_NRqn2YMYaZIyMkej30Xqy1scodUSnf32WJzm9wOwRnepi7aMqo7jk5TThHWQQARO1r0MmAAdRgi03AE5X8VBhag_Bu6MjX2Pp7c2HuxLPlhZEjCp9LSLzdVBdht97PVn5d2w%3D%3D)** **Your gift will show Nancy Pelosi that Arizona voters see through Tom O’Halleran’s “moderate” charade -- we know he votes with her agenda 97% of the time, and we do not want a Pelosi Puppet representing us!** Thank you for your patriotic support! Tiffany Shedd [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a1fc400a840b4bf1915a7c9627cc4160&_e=qlF18Jx24mO5jcT6PfxdYnVxlTeF65d6emU7r_x_gtw5dJAmAOUX9MT0InbY8xZjczVerMIfOllj7jRpVCWlYHd9fCBOy1m3SsaZwMeijndjfD6FeLAx-j2mOlPMwXsZbBOqgPZRqYnEEGvTVs-N0gOhTjgulmUCwG65lAjp_BjuANut6VNmmAZf4VnXLFxij37wWfnoWQdisXc_ApVvHT_657kjePDcyhNU8gtIz42lNYwvea7wAmhlezHQzjqVwapqeLux3ThJt-tsjbrz3dPCQW4l7Xeh76lZrDPX15FVtJjYLxkBf4Eu0riC26JOhpVQnDrUEHxHpImriSP82ZUZQR4AYc5rWEb1PDTIS1l-CAxTZNrUs77AE5b2RW-YCol3QZ-iimhwa3UC0KMoHg1SDapHPj0NTWP2lOnwrKsnd_SQbmG0MhdUFDyAhD4vs7ECXg1TJfqphdpDtsAW9Q%3D%3D) Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

subject: We need your voice (and your words) to win this election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Do you have time to write a letter to the editor or make a few calls for us? | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c3cec762da&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,
---
| Did you happen to catch the [great Letter to the Editor](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=cb09133844&e=5886ca081d) in yesterday’s South Bend Tribune from one of our campaign supporters, Nimbi Cushing?
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0e294634e1&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Letters to the Editors like this are essential in unseating Jackie Walorski. Your voices are just as important as Pat’s in these final weeks of the campaign.

Submitting a letter is easier than you think -- **especially because we have a super volunteer on our grassroots leadership team who will help you** meet the requirements of your local newspaper to be published.
---
| [WRITE YOUR OWN LETTER TO THE EDITOR](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=cfeeb6c423&e=5886ca081d "WRITE YOUR OWN LETTER TO THE EDITOR")
---
| Are you more comfortable talking than writing? _**We also have an urgent need for phone banking volunteers.**_

Voters in our district are already mailing in absentee ballots– approximately 5000 already returned– and early in-person voting starts in less than two weeks. [_**It is critical that we reach out now to tell people about Pat’s campaign for Dignity and Justice for All.**_](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d6a4ce2677&e=5886ca081d)

We’re making calls daily at 12 p.m. and 5 p.m. Just pick the day that works best for you!
---
|
---
| [SIGN UP TO PHONE BANK](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=75c4ac3783&e=5886ca081d "SIGN UP TO PHONE BANK")
---
| Thank you for being a part of this campaign. If we combine our voices now, together we can make a resounding call for Dignity and Justice for All in Washington after Nov. 3.

Team Hackett
---
|
---

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Get Registered!
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=255A535A20A2443)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | With a historic presidential election approaching, every eligible American voter should exercise his or her most basic civil right, the right to a free and fair election. Yet, one in four eligible Americans is not registered to vote, and with many states and counties changing election processes, voters are searching for much-needed information on how to vote this November. This week marked National Voter Registration Day, and True the Vote is empowering all eligible Americans with the information they need to get registered and check to make sure their registration is accurate and active by their state's deadline.

Three To-Dos for Your Voter Registration!

1. If you're over 18, a citizen, and not yet registered to vote [get registered!](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=255A535A20A2468)
2. If you are registered, go to the Secretary of State's website in your state and [check your registration](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=255A535A20A2468) to make sure it's accurate and active!
3. And, if you've moved recently, go to the Secretary of State website of [your former state](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=255A535A20A2468) and check your registration .... Is it still active? If so, contact their office and take the necessary steps to have your registration removed.

True the Vote is here to help with resources not just for getting registered, but also getting ready to vote and have your voice heard. We've created an interactive map of [State-By-State Voting Guides](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZyZXNvdXJjZXMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=255A535A20A2468) which provide important voter information for each state, including when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls.

This may be the most divisive election in American history so we must do everything we can to focus on what brings us all together: our most basic right as American citizens – on which many other rights of the American people depend – the right to vote.

Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | With a historic presidential election approaching, every eligible American voter should exercise his or her most basic civil right, the right to a free and fair election. Yet, one in four eligible Americans is not registered to vote, and with many states and counties changing election processes, voters are searching for much-needed information on how to vote this November. This week marked National Voter Registration Day, and True the Vote is empowering all eligible Americans with the information they need to get registered and check to make sure their registration is accurate and active by their state's deadline. Three To-Dos for Your Voter Registration! 1. If you're over 18, a citizen, and not yet registered to vote 2. If you are registered, go to the Secretary of State's website in your state and to make sure it's accurate and active! 3. And, if you've moved recently, go to the Secretary of State website of and check your registration .... Is it still active? If so, contact their office and take the necessary steps to have your registration removed. True the Vote is here to help with resources not just for getting registered, but also getting ready to vote and have your voice heard. We've created an interactive map of which provide important voter information for each state, including when to vote, how to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls. This may be the most divisive election in American history so we must do everything we can to focus on what brings us all together: our most basic right as American citizens – on which many other rights of the American people depend – the right to vote. Onward! | Patriot,
Can you believe we are less than six weeks away from Election Day?

President Trump is focused on Keeping America Great through lower taxes, secure borders, supporting our law enforcement, more jobs, and a stronger economy!

name: Jon Ossoff (personal inbox)
subject: Why we are in this situation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Why would we keep them in power, friend? |
---
Friend, the choice in this Election is simple, really.

For the past six-plus months, we have been unable to live our normal lives. So many of us haven't been able to visit our grandparents or see friends or even go to work or school.

_200,000 friends, neighbors, and grandparents are dead._

_Millions are out of work or facing eviction or foreclosure._

**Friend, we are in this situation as a country because we have an incompetent, malevolent president who did nothing to contain a generational public health emergency and an entire party in Congress that would rather enable him than save lives.**

_It is insane. It is unacceptable._

**Friend, why would we reward this historically disastrous Administration and its enablers with re-election? They have TOTALLY failed us.**

**[Today, help me defeat Trump's No. 1 enabler, Senator David Perdue. We need to defeat Trump, win a Senate majority, and strip Mitch McConnell of his power once and for all.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2faa/5b2c1286/3ac882b3/25f3a312/3517045459/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_j_covid?refcode=em_2020_09_25_j_covid")**

name: Team Inslee
subject: Damn sure
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is about promoting progress AND defending our democracy.
| Friend, When we can't count on the Supreme Court or the White House to protect our basic civil liberties, we can damn sure count on Jay Inslee. During times like these, governors like Jay make all the difference. Jay was already proving what a progressive agenda can do for a state, but now he's keeping the wolves from the door. That's why our aggressive $75,000 end-of-month goal matters so much. Ballots drop in just a few weeks, so it's now or never to leave it all on the field. **[Will you donate $5 or more right now to support the state-based fights for progress and to defend our democracy by helping reelect Jay Inslee as Washington's governor?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11864?t=3&akid=8167%2E868730%2EL5Nln9)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11865?t=4&akid=8167%2E868730%2EL5Nln9)

\--- Forwarded Message ---
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thu, Sep 24, 2020
Subject: State leaders and the Supreme Court
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=11&akid=8167%2E868730%2EL5Nln9)
Friend,
Soon enough, we may not be able to trust the Supreme Court to protect our rights -- from affordable health care to affirmative action, from reproductive rights to gun violence prevention.
We likely won't be able to depend on the Supreme Court, the White House, or a GOP-controlled Senate to fight for us. But as Washington's governor, I will fight. That was my solemn commitment before, and I've renewed it tenfold since last Friday evening. As long as I am governor, Washington will protect reproductive rights, take action to end the climate crisis, and lead in the movement to stop gun violence.
As governor, I will protect Washingtonians from laws simply meant to trigger Supreme Court hearings and further extreme right-wing values. I will enshrine progressive rights into law here in case of any federal rollback.
**Your investment in our campaign today before our end-of-month deadline is an investment in the fight to protect our basic human rights and our democracy. The Republican Governors Association -- like all Republican organizations -- is desperately clamoring to flip as many gubernatorial seats as possible. Their goal is to continue to advance GOP extremist values and control over our democracy. We can't let it happen.**
**[We set an aggressive end-of-month goal of $75,000 by midnight on Wednesday: Will you invest in the fight to protect our civil liberties before they even get to the federal level by donating $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11864?t=12&akid=8167%2E868730%2EL5Nln9)**
