name: Laura Loomer
subject: NEW VIDEO: Who will save the lives of our Seniors?
body:
This was a tough issue to address because it’s so real and the solution is so simple.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394686-929603-5209850-06f34fd463-616c8588ab)
Patriot,

This was a tough issue to address because it’s **so real and the solution is so simple**.

**COVID-19 has cost America MILLIONS of jobs.**

Aside from the immediate financial impact, there’s a FATAL issue that will affect our Senior Citizens.

Most Americans think their Social Security payments get locked away and saved for later. Nope, it’s a revolving account that requires a vibrant workforce to sustain.

Without the contributions of working Americans, the Social Security Fund will be depleted, in just a few years. Same with Medicare.

**There’s only ONE solution to fix this . . . JOBS!**

[**See our latest ad and help me get it on the air:**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394686-929603-5209850-06f34fd463-616c8588ab)

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394686-929603-5209850-06f34fd463-616c8588ab)
Nancy Pelosi and my opponent Lois Frankel want to shut down the economy again. They want to continue the **JOB KILLING** unemployment benefits that prevented small businesses from reopening.

Let me tell you a quick story about that.

One of our small business vendors owns a print shop and photography business.

The owner, Buzz, shut down when schools closed earlier this year because 90% of his business comes from school sports . . . soccer leagues, football games, girls volleyball, etc.

**With a heavy heart he had to lay off 20 of his photographers as there was NO WORK.**

Months later, he was able to resume work and he enthusiastically called up his photographers to get them back on board.

As he called one after another, he got the same response, “**Sorry Buzz, but I’m making more money on unemployment, I can’t come back.** ”

Buzz’s story isn’t unique.

It has happened all over America as Democrats want to keep our workers reliant on the government rather than reliant on themselves.

That’s the stark contrast between me and my opponent, and [**that’s why I’m asking for your help to win this congressional seat**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394686-929603-5209850-06f34fd463-616c8588ab).

[**Help me air my latest ad to Seniors in my district with a gift of $10 or more. Just $10 will help us reach 400 voters.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394686-929603-5209850-06f34fd463-616c8588ab)

Americans need to understand the long-term impact of Democrat policies, and they need to know **the ONLY solution to save Social Security and Medicare is JOBS!**

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trump’s Friday night super-spreader starts soon and I’m worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, Trump’s super-spreader rally is about to start in Newport News and I’m worried. Derek, we’re almost out of time and we’re still $2,480 short of our goal. **[Can you contribute anything you can afford right now and help put us over the top?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61PemjOl4ry0uD3lIkZnwZGW0J5csYq9UcZw7WHKPP_pfzzB3Myj6rDWwOfjatE5BTwuaq3aVyU7gd1rRIITrWNogEv26GOkmFvZGkIth7TPDHsw10z6iIu4e6748O2W7XCaU58HsOtH7A-Uham7M2IGv6DEV8xsteMIirEhfxNfS2b0KmEVC5uRX76BdJfledF-OXvW5jqIw4-38OUFE_2E96BJJAq6xmTIG7ptZlRMQLCrQzunrSd_29qCscwZyVHY5vfOl8AdxE--vpM0tWU3KEDKhd6FcvlDX5uhISPifVj0HdSeqo9xix6dOBnW9repWSkm15EwedbxY_87qXjg/35h/szj-VAEzS4CNxL7wNSlF9Q/h0/batJs7z-zrUKrYxU7YZ-HulzqCIdLBVjtSMZjKz3Vuc)** | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61PemjOl4ry0uD3lIkZnwZGUu0WAQLJzskCDxtDMle4Z5ju0OidSbuUzPH1ATY0WbijLedWIA8VyYyibmeCLwaCKnFRZQezVzjBvWsg9EaDY30IaF0T_MsNJ_Ez8eCKeaGOJKxmmJbsP3xCe7xyCZnk2Xh6wqy6RmogLHuzsPqS5ZBHY85lXNMryvAXr71Q-hTnFz0y4pYwzZ7xSCXQO1JVKlIfxJNV0HUGHsjJThNb2p7LpBe5teuYk0lc7cwJ96erhoJxszxrB6DplM__v56xeW4XZiZWFxIf_3CLHn-hbVT_NZ-yCrtoCxHMCMGRWz33PLwAcz2Kq0oCLvkLjEudU/35h/szj-VAEzS4CNxL7wNSlF9Q/h1/Q42Z5T14lt35Q7ryGQawThmI29DadkRE3_pH7SYLr3U)

Look, I’ll be blunt. Right now the President of the United States is refusing to commit to a peaceful transition of power after the election. To make matters worse, this wannabe dictator, clown is expected to name his pick to fill Justice Ginsburg’s seat tomorrow.
The last thing we need right now is one of his clown show rallies that put the health of Virginians at risk.
Enough is enough. Let’s send Trump a message that Virginians are more fired up than ever to run up the score and beat him big in November.
****
**[If we have any shot of reaching our $20,000 goal before Donald Trump’s rally, I need your help right now. Can you rush a contribution of whatever is meaningful to you right now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61PemjOl4ry0uD3lIkZnwZGVkpdGi7HEmS-JPL7Ssco59L3kAlN78FQfz5-I7JDxk9zILO00v_e_qYWnpctN4BplG47a2v2zj-D3GG303Tl7rCcPRoQ3BhqiPLeOynbzcYrZJmy-cw7L5z70szKf_lZNZrC2Hb697IMBKWNrprMyxLe7KF-0h2hAlKi2NIjIf8FUUNl769H9Swbnh5lqcf4uksivAZviibCHiSujFlpyXuZbiMW1vsSllw0mO2vtjGlB4iS7Ypt1QJA89WQRhQ9GKymi2lHOR9JMD6B8xFygP0qb3UwCDHInFO6U5M1a2M8GIs9v4EdHydKTe8JVefig/35h/szj-VAEzS4CNxL7wNSlF9Q/h2/S7Z8xP5WxD6FU9Bg7A7cYmSEhbfSonc-YDzRZ7jS0eM)**

Terry McAuliffe

subject: Did you get #VoteReady on National Voter Registration Day?
body:
Plus, honoring RBG's legacy. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/september-25-634888?e=0aad15100c)

|

|

## **Thanks for joining us! **

We held our first Outvote Day of Action for National Voter Registration Day on Tuesday, and we were so grateful for your support. If you missed any of our inspiring dialogues between digital personalities and advocacy organizations like Planned Parenthood and ACLU, [check out the recordings on IGTV](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=1659972f15&e=0aad15100c).

Did you miss National Voter Registration Day? It's not too late: make sure you're ready to vote this November by [checking your registration here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=8846066068&e=0aad15100c).

---
|

|

| | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=54c49e0fe1&e=0aad15100c)
---
Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg's dying wish was that her Supreme Court seat not be filled until after the inauguration. [Sign MoveOn's petition](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=e579c1bf39&e=0aad15100c) to ask senators to halt the nomination process until January.

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### "Women belong in all places where decisions are being made.
It shouldn't be that women are the exception."

**\- Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg**
Interview with USA Today **//**** ** 2009

Last week, we had supporters across the state _safely and responsibly_ knocking on doors and making calls to support our campaign.

**Our team set an ambitious goal to talk to 25,000 voters in one day. Can you join us to help?**

Time is running out and to reach the goal, we need your help! -- [_**Click here to RSVP!**_](https://u14066317.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=xDqpR0G3DjuYE5JnpHlAmZTdBrgFC3xZepXQi3pi5WBIP0lBK7vph8muRdeP06RjWFwFyfAt4C7sHtrISUYW478TmarcMasy3a7k2Rcl0gPIz7so-2F-2Fwv8tzg7m5UD1F3qqLU_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6cgkHiVzANoqtzpnwInVBePtmFouMVvaSKEMGRenAYBOMwYZALYXlyxTN1MB-2FCYdM6F2Kd4p2X7D7Se8ZhAxLAODnfWJAAz2lG9ShPoX9t6nkmuJUfdrGAy2jktwlazc-2B4Fs8Ilg3VBA2gvMVuV7IkZipYjMndmvy9q6SB-2BM6Lc7dsxd6nESey5uu9Hbas2DpHjS6Kr8QKBf6XHH5hEmGP-2FmNlgFZOi8BWa2mX-2Baanlqzubezn3UgbXRJpBvvt6W0BL8zFacememV79Q4shwg4fjyQZSOaApxrhSlIw8KOILVum9-2BvZcIphBVuo-2B0d4SKhTL9gkhyY-2FirsQmhwppZBVWGlbIsQAFxBzty9UWBK6jsMe-2B-2BIajruTKWP-2BXqSiuGRrpRSzU7RPKLwUlrwPelaAvbfDg1Txp6wND038mKgJAHcVBS9YBZO2lI5aAxJAVgfdqeGBlufKc22VBzSU1DCeacWGHLieJRyiYSChPhMeU-2FjfS4ZFEcj7Po5GBeFcv-2FUz-2FO0bJ1oxBergARTOQa1hS2UzPr0KORIHOehzkX56YnYof06WLdwbmnlzRsQGr8sMIvfJNmTy97NwpfhQHXhCAZPTf9RB-2Fc3CC69ReLh7kNDivxAcuEJ4GOFZZ1F7jCK0zow8LkGPCd-2BmSFMsCVn-2BuRDdybV9SmfUmfOLzqxt6U8ap92mrP74tqlvieuQhXK0k6T5PgSZ4rvCn6gLMgktsVGxIfb2gQo3UStdobuZWxVGPnwox-2FkY68dVsMhwZboU9xNgE-2FB6AL-2FR7Cq4TBQAU5WPoCE76agrNvbF6bRmoujTtJUU2TYsUcrF6X8tyueEgF52Io2vbJCE4gYDSXYN-2F-2BietSRCtReVpBE-2BVUA2JqLshbGwLegt0iL6eF3Kso)

**The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support our campaign is by hearing from other supporters like YOU!** Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact us at [_info@markronchetti.com_](mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=)!

We need supporters from across the state to fight with us and talk to voters about why this race is so important. We need your help to tell New Mexico about our campaign! Sign up today!

We hope we can count on you!
---
---
Mark Ronchetti

PS: Every day counts and every door we knock on or call we make gets us one voter closer to victory! Time is running out and we need your help! clean_body: | | | | Peter, Last week, we had our first Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday and it was a great success! Unfortunately, we did fall short of our goal to reach 25,000 voters. Can you help us make sure we get there this week and sign up for our campaign’s Sleeves-Rolled-Up Saturday? Last week, we had supporters across the state safely and responsibly knocking on doors and making calls to support our campaign. Our team set an ambitious goal to talk to 25,000 voters in one day. Can you join us to help? Time is running out and to reach the goal, we need your help! -- | The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support our campaign is by hearing from other supporters like YOU! Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact us at mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=! We need supporters from across the state to fight with us and talk to voters about why this race is so important. We need your help to tell New Mexico about our campaign! Sign up today! We hope we can count on you! Mark Ronchetti PS: Every day counts and every door we knock on or call we make gets us one voter closer to victory! Time is running out and we need your help! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Don’t be one of these.
body:
Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) said: “In the last election 54 million evangelical Christians stayed home. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8324a2a3202a/dont-be-one-of-these?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Dear ,
Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) said: “In the last election 54 million evangelical Christians stayed home. If Christians will simply show up and vote our values, we’ll turn this country around.”

We have a Scriptural mandate to be salt and light (Matthew 5:13-14). I believe that part of that mandate means that before Election Day, we do our due diligence to find out all we can about the women and men who are seeking to lead our country and our state. Equipped with that knowledge we then go and vote, and we share what we have learned with others and encourage them to vote. **_In the midst of all of that doing, we must be praying._** We know that the Lord is sovereign over all things; we acknowledge that and ask for His grace and mercy to be poured out on our nation.

Join CWA as we pray along with our Young Women for America leaders representing universities from across the country. We will gather with them on Friday, September 25, at our CWA headquarters to discuss the upcoming election and pray for our nation. There are two ways to participate: [Facebook Live](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ffd4c4c8d2&e=01c99b7fbd) or by conference call number: Dial-in number: (712) 770-4921, Participant Code: 704998.
Thank you.

Penny Young Nance
CEO and President
Concerned Women for America

P.S. CWA is proud to partner with iVoterGuide to provide you with information about the candidates in your state. Go to [www.iVoterGuide.com](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=167658c3ae&e=01c99b7fbd) to educate yourself about those who are seeking elected office in your state.
---
| | | [Support The She Prays, She Votes 2020 Campaign](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=7e1539a279&e=01c99b7fbd "Support The She Prays, She Votes 2020 Campaign")
---

your sons, your daughters, your wives, and your houses.”**
**– Nehemiah 4:14**

I believe that part of that mandate means that before Election Day, we do our due diligence to find out all we can about the women and men who are seeking to lead our country and our state. Equipped with that knowledge we then go and vote, and we share what we have learned with others and encourage them to vote. **_In the midst of all of that doing, we must be praying._** We know that the Lord is sovereign over all things; we acknowledge that and ask for His grace and mercy to be poured out on our nation.

Join CWA as we pray along with our Young Women for America leaders representing universities from across the country. We will gather with them on Friday, September 25, at our CWA headquarters to discuss the upcoming election and pray for our nation. There are two ways to participate: [Facebook Live](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=21af1a3e01&e=01c99b7fbd) or by conference call number: Dial-in number: (712) 770-4921, Participant Code: 704998.
Thank you.

Penny Young Nance
CEO and President
Concerned Women for America

P.S. CWA is proud to partner with iVoterGuide to provide you with information about the candidates in your state. Go to [www.iVoterGuide.com](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=3c43746cfc&e=01c99b7fbd) to educate yourself about those who are seeking elected office in your state.

Friend,

**The future of the Illinois Supreme Court rests in our hands this November.**

Chicago Democrats have controlled the court for over **half a century** , but with Justice Thomas Kilbride on the ballot this time around, we have the chance to put an end to their reign by replacing him with conservative Justice David Overstreet.

Justice Kilbride has spent the past **20 years** on the bench turning a blind eye to Mike Madigan’s rampant corruption when he should have been upholding the law and defending the people of Illinois, and we’ve paid the price **every. single. time.**

**Madigan’s fate hinges on the outcome of this vote and he’s doing everything he can to tip the scales by funneling over $4 million into Justice Kilbride’s reelection campaign.**

**_We can’t let Madigan’s money beat our votes this November._**
[**Chip in to Take Back the Supreme Court >>>**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e614cc4e9d574a05bc057489724cde0f&_e=Eu-iX4_sw7M-3q1a3pkMt3frlLGpNOz9c-jAcF-AcBxe4sZqJjoii2-erW18QmfhQ1FhcgUKRGB2WxXWp4aRO0FCWy6LsHR7JHZoenkgQOFddLLcpPCqlsKnhb6sso-9_ffduThQgs-8HDxF1do9hrOAUeqE1DOcDxlzFEYtARqPmIEAqKi9EGhVE_DdqHkhpoWUcxhbvdGATz2_ClfuYJrkm2Dq4jVlfmr5Ig8TEI1n-dKhtCltLka-K0Z-Kypn7tIJg7Sd5sWJ9vPcKucVFKldoicxPbtUNZ8kAP5dSOEQ_Xd2336GWOXAdddp6kjmoJE4R6oEpz3RE3DWluSo9BATDBqy9DUiSFIq9e3-PYcKwCBw796cfuJLqqwsq8aialWwUT7QEM7iO-V7zpQhwtrDNeTdIQF3bGczvBXWrFLeczaoIr2Ms8ro1pRkLb06Z8Cp3h5C_3RSuvU16I2WpCOc57-Ye-qW3GFA9XmMQ-0%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

[**Donate Today**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=e614cc4e9d574a05bc057489724cde0f&_e=Eu-iX4_sw7M-3q1a3pkMt3frlLGpNOz9c-jAcF-AcBxe4sZqJjoii2-erW18QmfhQ1FhcgUKRGB2WxXWp4aRO0FCWy6LsHR7JHZoenkgQOFddLLcpPCqlsKnhb6sso-9_ffduThQgs-8HDxF1do9hrOAUeqE1DOcDxlzFEYtARqPmIEAqKi9EGhVE_DdqHkhpoWUcxhbvdGATz2_ClfuYJrkm2Dq4jVlfmr5Ig8TEI1n-dKhtCltLka-K0Z-Kypn7tIJg7Sd5sWJ9vPcKucVFNyIeI-ZB2NbSINppMeTnG9lju1jtlBdhoJxjm_2LfLUJTxcFg_BHUBg_uF7SrE7IubACtE8yJfHsy07Tg8LL5yy5BgWTgSfoTCbVyJ2KFYj9EnRNCr5AofGkdBlPG-LsKi5t43HbxTGL79EkC-HVg_H5Uo4C5oH4pQ22o9gsKB5ws10k12UPSxB2KZvgj8EyVoYR63EZMZnkjwZlN1UDQ8%3D)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Fun with masks
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
School might look different this year, but our kids are still learning. Our school communities across the state are doing a great job of finding new and innovative ways to help kids get the education they deserve while staying safe. I got to see this firsthand yesterday, when I visited LaPerche Elementary in Smithfield. One thing I was struck by was how much fun the kids had showing off their favorite masks! So this weekend, I want to ask you -- are the kids in your life having fun with their new masks?
---
|
---
| Wearing a mask at school is new for all of us, and it's our job to help our kids feel comfortable and have a little fun. We've partnered with local company ABCya to produce a [fun set of Back-to-School coloring pages](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4SrujtJ6SoKYuKWc0Lbn1lUdEyk3n9gEL2BBGh1b3YVPEbzERH6zUmcHLj8_WMAPeDL8Ra73WJLcgy0gkpLPgwA8KVSJgKpsphi-NxK88TY9r&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==) in English and Spanish and a [great mask-making game](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4SrujtJ6SoKYu_Fw4WrKAcY6LClZitDsJr5PnJ03CmJ2SMTQkkadKNBrR5bFfFQW15eWbY7ga-MXiGULtC6GnEkMx9dyDQW6rNipaslPAXYRhk69EA9h_7Po=&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==).
You can even make your own real mask. The Centers for Disease Control has a[ great do-it-yourself guide](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4SrujtJ6SoKYuEJ7yN2Y8ohC1H-hCQ11rOQKb_WHgxg9pIIebZOpvIA2xrcPWY_BuhRY9gPRZMJS8PSspJVjtmP86OiAezoa0sLRPuO9cVVGR4xFt3Eujk1XLs0ykhO5Hn3sAQYcpMPMbAM7bsUGW4Vu8v2Y-znS7QrqY7yIDTA3nGLsVVQrMPc7RxxzUQ1ALf7WaXkdGCSXZ&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==) to making a mask just for you. Let your kids design their own mask and show off their style!
Are the kids in your life already wearing a mask they love? I want to see it! You can share pictures with me by [email](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov?Subject=Here%27s%20my%20favorite%20mask) or on [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4Smtia7q7BXnxX2zEnyfddVl3PDqIdVTGZ-Cqp_IUPVvUhkRmqU5e4i8KBvRuICIKSyKOco_gMMXOBol_mY_LT9oKFHM8N0EBqtacblOtaST3wHVL16p_3nDFEVQFjcZZBzyazo7ItoHjurinhCTFFwAmQhMtttXf3VPOF7OKmipQ-985UZVYXE7tTH2y0waLr3tLmWplGQzyn0sS1ZIoRKf3YiwyKoaLJLk9xSZ0o08A&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==).
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4SrujtJ6SoKYu5YDUyYQamSjI1XW74oVsjacXnItQM0BNjt4Bza8BoH5BMG_CY8tsn9XPFmstp8O-7_0rnPCsjo3lZ83jYX7gjs-i_VUYr8O6z_8PQFywk1Rl1zhQujQEoa6Vj5BfsexEgy3mo90HcviF54bC_QD4KH63wSJf3lYnrAZ9SKFQp2rnA2viCy2Hlv9xRl5MclHc0METennSidRcYNj2roEWL68QTRzGIYDxRXlBYQLAm6VJcQGmjKVHF475xP_B_64DuRsGqL3zu_U=&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4Sst28wo_hbIVPQaP0ez83Ppd077n7zMNSfV-bJMs3fcJ25KEjNIiaSLEfcgR2a9I0CmvLaLK8gi2seacrCepcx6cma9eH3aCpreAghhm3KmoMtYuuSN3wx8qtua04YizVmsraEejEnu5VRMJ-33oxgI=&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yc_R8ixnHDstJWjJ5PT7TutQkyc_azf4PNR7rwNTwBIcJc9q2--4Sst28wo_hbIVPQaP0ez83Ppd077n7zMNSfV-bJMs3fcJ25KEjNIiaSLEfcgR2a9I0CmvLaLK8gi2seacrCepcx6cma9eH3aCpreAghhm3KmoMtYuuSN3wx8qtua04YizVmsraEejEnu5VRMJ-33oxgI=&c=UEYxvVN1OAPXbdlnsMDIMer5iBDBJNQE1b4CfP96WfpbgUL4BwxzCg==&ch=RTra9ldfS-lC2iseKW83MAqgjeozoNIwQXDqAuXLcNl6TZwh438b3A==).
---

name: Bill Olson
subject: I support those Born Alive!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I agree with President Trump's strong pro-life stance and I will fight alongside the President to protect the unborn and the born alive!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

President Trump is doing the right thing for the unborn. He may be the most pro-life President of my lifetime.

This is a man who has remade the Federal Judiciary to become the most pro-life that the judiciary has ever been. He took the liberals' objections and overruled them- so that the most vulnerable among us could live and enjoy all this country offers.

Now Trump has done what no one before him has: protect those babies born alive through a misdone abortion.

President Trump on Wednesday announced he will sign an executive order he says would ensure all babies born alive, including those born prematurely or that survive abortions, receive medical care, in an appeal to conservative and religious voters.

"Today I am announcing that I will be signing the born alive executive order to assure that all precious babies born alive, no matter their circumstances, receive the medical care that they deserve. This is our sacrosanct moral duty," Trump said during a pre-recorded address to the National Catholic Prayer Breakfast.

The president said his administration would also increase federal funding for neonatal research.

The President has done THE RIGHT THING- even in the face of those who believe that not everyone is worthy of life.

"Our nation is strong because of Catholics and all people of faith," Trump said in his address. "We believe in the joy of family, the blessing of freedom and the dignity of work, and the eternal truth that every child, born and unborn, is made in the holy image of God. I will always protect the vital role of religion and prayer in American society, and I will always defend the sacred right to life."

Trump has repeatedly hammered Democrats for supporting abortions later in pregnancy, seizing on proposals in New York and Virginia that would have allowed third-trimester abortions in certain cases where the fetus's or mother's health is at risk.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

In my experience, in the history of humanity, nothing good ever happens when one group of people decides that another group is not worthy to live.

Yet that is the very essence of Abortion. Deciding one group of people may not live based on their age.

This is what the Democrats want. It's why they are going insane over the replacement of Justice Ginsburg.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

I will stand up for the unborn, like the President does! I have taken an oath to the United States Constitution, defending her against all foes foreign OR domestic! I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

If we want to defend our Constitution against the encroachment by the extreme Left, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=jC7W8xt.7F6OuRU&b=6TKJhmnsDvpgv8dn08wL3A

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
President Trump Rolls Out 'America First' Healthcare Plan Aimed at Protecting Preexisting Conditions; HBCUs Have a Champion in President Trump... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b34b276cdc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**President Trump Rolls Out 'America First' Healthcare Plan Aimed at Protecting Preexisting Conditions**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1701b0bde&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Townhall_
Yesterday, President Trump signed an executive order on the America First Healthcare Plan—"aimed at reforming the healthcare system; the measures include expanding choice, lowering prescription drug prices, protecting coverage for preexisting conditions and ending ‘surprise billing,’” Reagan McCarthy reports. “The president’s order criticizes [Obamacare], pointing to the law’s failure to expand coverage and reduce the price of premiums.”

**🎬** **WATCH:**[**President Trump unveils America First Healthcare Plan!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=423bae3948&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**When Conventional Wisdom Gets Downright Dangerous**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d43f5cb40&e=3ee4985eea)
_-National Review_
“The problem with conventional wisdom is not that it is always wrong. The rub is that the majority of ‘experts’ unthinkingly and habitually mouth its validity until they ensure that it becomes static, unchanging, and immune from reexamination and dissent—an intolerant religious orthodoxy that finally become dangerous,” Victor Davis Hanson writes.
---
|
---
| [**Supreme Court Justice Confirmations in Election Years Are Common — Despite Dem Complaints**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3dc7abca9f&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Confirming Supreme Court justices when both parties control the White House and Senate in an election year is perfectly normal. Indeed, it may be the most normal thing Washington does in this most unusual year,” Sen. Mike Lee (R-UT) writes. Now, the left is issuing threats: “If Republicans exercise political power, Democrats will respond by abusing theirs.”

**🎬** **Press Secretary:**[**The far left is in control of the Democrat Party**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47da8fd6f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[White House Targets Historically Black Colleges for Rapid COVID-19 Tests](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b70a0f8296&e=3ee4985eea)**
-McClatchy DC
“In an effort to prevent potential COVID-19 outbreaks in high-risk communities, the Trump administration said it has started shipping rapid coronavirus tests to more than three dozen historically Black colleges and universities . . . Each school is expected to receive between 3,000 and 10,000 tests initially, and they will be resupplied ‘as often as they need,’” Francesca Chambers and Grace Asiegbu report.
---
|
---
| [**More Than 300 People From 29 States Arrested for Crimes Under Guise of ‘Peaceful’ Protests, Justice Department Says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f2b2c5ad3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Daily Caller_
“More than 40 of the 94 U.S. Attorneys’ Offices have filed charges alleging crimes including arson, burglary, and felon in possession of a firearm and ammunition, among others,” Marlo Safi reports. “While peaceful protests have taken place, riots have erupted in many cities, causing extensive damage and even resulting in numerous deaths.”

**🎬** **WATCH:**[**President Trump supports peaceful protest, not lawlessness!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e76b88ca86&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bfb93c1d6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85e19c83ad&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=350fa609c5)

| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Help me stop Pelosi, Butterfield, and AOC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020.**

I was furious that Pelosi wasted the people's time and money on a purely partisan impeachment sham. Her scandalous waste of time and effort left us less prepared for COVID, and impugned a great President who was finally vindicated!
**_Can you believe that Nancy Pelosi, drunk with power and driven mad by the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, is already threatening ANOTHER pointless partisan impeachment sham, to prevent the President from exercising his sworn Constitutional duties!_**
_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi on Sunday would not rule out impeachment as an option to stop President Trump’s U.S. Supreme Court pick from being confirmed to the bench, saying Democrats will “use every arrow in our quiver” to block the eventual nominee._

_Just hours after it was announced that Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg had passed away on Friday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., vowed that a Trump nominee to the Supreme Court to fill her vacancy “will receive a vote on the floor of the United States Senate.”

During an interview on ABC News’ “This Week,” Pelosi, D-Calif., was asked whether she and House Democrats would move to impeach the president, or Attorney General Bill Barr in an effort to prevent the Senate from acting._

_“We have our options. We have arrows in our quiver that I’m not about to discuss right now, but the fact is we have a big challenge in our country,”_
_Pelosi said. “This president has threatened to not even accept the results of the election.”_

_She added: “Our main goal would be to protect the integrity of the election as we protect the people from the coronavirus.”_

_Pelosi was pressed again on whether she would employ impeachment tactics, to which she said the Constitution requires that Congress “use every arrow in our quiver.”_

She is mad! What gives this tinpot dictator the right to disregard the Constitution and threaten actions that could result in a civil war?
It's bad enough that she threatens to flaunt the Constitution and enlarge the Supreme Court to pack it with stark-raving liberals.... _but she also wants to impeach Trump for executing his Constitutionally-prescribed duties???_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)
---

**_Nancy Pelosi and the rest of her extremist team of Democrats must go! _**

_Nancy Pelosi's Deputy Whip is G.K. Butterfield- my far-left opponent. He does not represent us- he's never even represented half the voters in my newly-redrawn swing district!_

I will stop Nancy Pelosi from impeaching the President OR from packing the court! [Can you help me win with the President?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional, and his Supreme Court picks have been superb!

**Pelosi's Democrats are going psycho right now- just frothing at the mouth! I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and taking him out sends a strong message to Pelosi about her abuses of power! **

**Butterfield is an AWFUL campaigner, and I've fought him tooth and nail to this point. I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you!**

[If you want the President to perform his duties and lead our country, I need your help to beat Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! 2020 is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield's record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iAM.M2jZ03Nxmng&b=8soE0mpxJpcOGtnjUlGh3g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fill the Seat!
body:
Clinton Email Court Battle

[INSIDE JW]

SUPREME COURT NOMINATION FIGHT

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20612&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS92a3dJbmZrMlpucz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMDkyNTIxNTIwNQ==]

We send our condolences to the family of Supreme Court Justice Ruth
Bader Ginsburg. She had a wonderful judicial temperament that will
always be remembered.

President Trump now has a historic opportunity to nominate yet another
constitutional conservative who will honor the Constitution and the
rule of law across the full spectrum of constitutional issues.

And the Senate should move quickly to work with President Trump to
consider and approve a new justice who will faithfully apply the U.S.
Constitution. There is no reason we cannot have a new justice by
Election Day.

Regarding the Supreme Court vacancy, my belief is that if Democrats
can impeach in an election year, Trump can certainly fill a seat on
the Court in an election year. President Trump is set to announce
his nomination this weekend. It is important that your share your
views about the confirmation battle with your senators at
202-225-3121. Don’t presume any outcome is preordained or that even
senators you don’t support won’t be pleased to hear from you! This
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20613&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vb3Bpbmlvbi9naW5zYnVyZy12YWNhbmN5LWltcGVhY2htZW50LWVsZWN0aW9uLXllYXItc3VwcmVtZS1jb3VydC10b20tZml0dG9uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
is what I wrote for Fox News.

When karma lands, it lands hard. This is the lesson Democrats are now
learning with the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth
Bader Ginsburg, and the reality that President Trump will move
forward to fill her seat this week.

In years past, Democrats might have had the tools to stop the process
in its tracks, or the comity and goodwill to be able to reach a
compromise with Senate Republicans or the White House. But they have
squandered their goodwill and disarmed their senators, leaving them
with little to do but fume and threaten.

Democrats say they are angry about the precedent and propriety of a
hurry-up nomination process. They invoke Ginsburg’s supposed
“dying wish” she “not be replaced until a new president is
installed."

Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., threatened that
“nothing is off the table for next year” if Senate Republicans
move the process forward. And Massachusetts Rep. Joe Kennedy
III tweeted his contempt for the Supreme Court, saying: “If he
holds a vote in 2020, we pack the court in 2021. It’s that
simple.”

But this is a case of “coup karma.”

If the Left can unilaterally impeach and try to remove a president
during an election year, a Supreme Court justice can certainly be
appointed during an election year. Democrats can hardly stand on
principle regarding election year nominations when they were more than
willing to engage in a partisan, election-year impeachment fiasco
based on a contrived pretext that had no chance of prevailing.

The impeachment followed other failed attempts to sabotage Trump –
illicit spying, the “insurance policy,” seeking to invoke the
25th Amendment to remove him from office, and the Mueller “witch
hunt” investigation that harassed him despite almost everyone in
D.C. knowing that there was never any evidence of Russian collusion.

After the Mueller fiasco flamed out, Democrats weaponized the
whistleblower process to create a fake scandal out of a harmless July
25, 2019, conversation between President Trump and President Volodymyr
Zelensky of Ukraine. This became the basis for what George Washington
University Law Professor Jonathan Turley called “the shortest
proceeding, with the thinnest evidentiary record, and the narrowest
grounds ever used to impeach a president.”

Recall that the impeachment moved out of the House based on an
unprecedented party-line vote!

The fact that the coup impeachment was occurring as an election was
looming made no impression on Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., and her
minions, who were eager to leave Trump “impeached forever” (though
he was also acquitted forever).

Byron York called it “an election-year gambit” using the
impeachment as “the most audacious opposition research maneuver of
all time.” And Berkeley law professor John Yoo cautioned that the
Founding Fathers would have rejected the idea of an election-year
impeachment because they “expected that the American people would
hold a president accountable for any abuses of power at the ballot
box.”

So it is ironic to hear Democrats saying that the people should
decide who gets to choose the next Supreme Court justice when they
were more than willing to deny voters the opportunity to judge
President Trump’s fitness for office.

Defenders of the election-year impeachment also argued that the
timing was valid since the “crimes” under investigation might
affect the outcome of the election itself. A similar argument can be
made regarding filling Ginsburg’s vacant seat.

The Left has hired 600 hundred lawyers for the Biden campaign and
intends the Supreme Court to be an active participant in the 2020
election. The stakes going into November are frankly too high to have
a Supreme Court not at full strength.

Democrats have pushed for a mail-in election that virtually guarantees
fraud and chaos and subsequent urgent litigation. They have instructed
Democratic nominee Joe Biden not to concede under any circumstances
and have threatened violence if they do not win.

The country cannot afford to have an eight-member Supreme Court that
could deadlock on critical questions coming from these dangerous
circumstances. We are staring down the barrel of potentially the
greatest constitutional crisis since the Civil War, and we need nine
justices on the bench. As then-President Obama tweeted in October
2016, “the need for a ninth justice is undeniably clear.”

There is plenty of time. Justice Ginsburg was confirmed only 42 days
after she was nominated by President Bill Clinton. President Trump’s
nominee should get the same speedy consideration by the Senate.

A confirmation vote by Oct. 30 is completely doable. Especially since
a cabal of corrupt politicians tried to ram through an election-year
impeachment and failed. Again, coup karma.

It is absurd to suggest a president whose party controls the Senate
should jointly decline to fill a vacant Supreme Court seat – ever.
Fill the seat.

JUDICIAL WATCH WILL APPEAL DECISION ON CLINTON EMAIL TESTIMONY

Anything to keep the full truth about Hillary Clinton’s emails
hidden ...

The State Department just asked a judge to overturn a court order
authorizing additional discovery in our FOIA lawsuit that led directly
to the 2015 disclosure of former Secretary of State Hillary Rodham
Clinton personal email system.

We have now filed our opposition to this latest effort.

The State Department’s motion seeks to avoid the depositions of
Clinton’s former Chief of Staff Cheryl Mills as well as current and
former State Department Information Technology Officials Brett
Gittleson and Yvette Jacks.

We argue that the State Department is wrong to try to expand an August
2020 appellate court ruling blocking Clinton’s deposition. The
ruling did not bar the deposition of Mills or any other witness. We
intend to seek further review of the ruling.

The lawsuit seeks records about the Obama administration’s public
statements regarding the 2012 terrorist attack on the U.S. consulate
in Benghazi, Libya. In addition to exposing the Clinton email system,
the lawsuit uncovered “talking points” drafted by Obama
administration officials demonstrating that then-National Security
Advisor Susan Rice’s statements on the eve of the 2012 presidential
election were false (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State_ (No.
1:14-cv-01242)).

On December 6, 2018, U.S. District Court Judge Royce Lamberth ordered
that Rice and senior Obama State Department officials, lawyers and
Clinton aides be deposed or answer written questions under oath in the
lawsuit. Judge Lamberth called Clinton’s email system “one of the
gravest modern offenses to government transparency.”

In May 2019, Rice admitted under oath that she emailed Clinton on
Clinton’s personal email account and “in rare instances”
received emails related to U.S. government business on her own
personal email account. Rice claimed she “took steps” to ensure
that official emails were “also on her government email account”
but did not identify those steps. Rice’s 2019 sworn answers are
available here.

On March 2, 2020, Judge Lamberth ordered us to depose Clinton and
Mills, under oath, regarding Clinton’s email system and the
existence of records about the Benghazi attack. Clinton and Mills
filed an emergency mandamus appeal to avoid testifying.

It is shameful that we still must battle Hillary Clinton, the DOJ, and
the State Department in court over the Clinton email scandal.
President Trump should demand answers about these efforts to avoid
accountability and the truth.

JUDICIAL WATCH IS SUING ILLINOIS FOR REFUSING TO DISCLOSE VOTER ROLL
DATA

A key issue this year (and, frankly, every year!) is clean voter
rolls. Toward this end, we filed a lawsuit against the state of
Illinois, the Illinois State Board of Elections, and its director for
failing to allow public access to its voter roll data in violation of
the federal National Voter Registration Act of 1993
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
(NVRA).

State officials refused to allow the non-profit Illinois Conservative
Union and three lawfully registered Illinois voters to obtain a copy
of the state’s voter registration list, despite their lawful request
for those records under federal law. We filed the lawsuit on their
behalf in the United States District Court in the Northern District of
Illinois (_Illinois Conservative Union et al v. Illinois et al. _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20614&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2lsbGlub2lzLWNvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZS11bmlvbi1ldC1hbC12LWlsbGlub2lzLWV0LWFsLWNvbXBsYWludC0wNTU0Mi9dKE5vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1.
1:20-cv-05542)). Judicial Watch Attorney Robert Popper is the director
of our election integrity initiative. We are being assisted by
attorney David J. Shestokas of Orland Park, Illinois.

Federal law provides that states “shall make available for public
inspection and, where available, photocopying at a reasonable cost,
all records concerning the implementation of programs and activities
conducted for the purpose of ensuring the accuracy and currency of
official lists of eligible voters.”

On July 24, 2019, the Illinois Conservative Union sent a public
records request under this provision to the Illinois State Board of
Elections, requesting information about the maintenance of voter
rolls, including the most recent voter registration list for Illinois.
The request noted that the records “would be used solely for
purposes intended by federal law, namely, to ensure the accuracy and
currency of the official list of eligible voters,” the complaint
said.

The State Board of Elections denied the request, claiming that only
political committees or governmental bodies may receive copies of
records. The State Board did allow a few Illinois Conservative Union
members to travel to Springfield, Illinois during working hours and
afforded them the opportunity to review Illinois’ millions of voter
records one at a time on a computer terminal, with no ability to sort
or organize records. By this lawsuit the Illinois Conservative Union
seeks meaningful access to the records it requested.

As several federal courts have recognized, the public records
provisions of the National Voter Registration Act were intended to
enhance the ability of private groups to monitor whether states are
removing ineligible voters from their voter rolls. In April, a federal
court in Maryland noted that organizations “such as Judicial
Watch” have “the resources and expertise that few individuals can
marshal. By excluding these organizations from access to voter
registration lists,” the purpose of the federal law is undermined.
That court ordered Maryland
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=18613&F=T&]
to produce complete voter registration records we requested.

In Illinois, our research found that 14 out of 102 counties (14% of
all counties) have more registered voters than citizens over 18, while
Illinois as a whole has 660,000 inactive registrants.

So our lawsuit aims to open up Illinois voting records so private
groups can tell whether they are dirty. Illinois voters and citizens
have a right to review election rolls under federal law and
Illinois’ refusal to make them available suggests the state knows
the rolls are a mess and won’t stand the light of the day.

Thanks to your support, we are a national leader for cleaner
elections.

Earlier this year, we sued Pennsylvania
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=18726&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1wYS12b3RpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
and
North Carolina
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=18485&F=T&]
for failing to make reasonable efforts to remove ineligible voters
from their rolls as required by federal law. The lawsuits allege that
the two states have nearly 2 million extra names on voter registration
rolls.

In 2018, the Supreme Court upheld a voter-roll cleanup program that
resulted from a Judicial Watch settlement of a federal lawsuit with
Ohio
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=17110&F=T&].
California settled
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=15011&F=T&]
a National Voter Registration Act lawsuit with us and last year began
the process of removing up to 1.6 million inactive names from Los
Angeles County’s voter rolls. Kentucky
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=17111&F=T&]
also began a cleanup of hundreds of thousands of old registrations
last year after it entered into a consent decree to end another
Judicial Watch lawsuit.

Our 2019 study found 378 counties nationwide that had more voter
registrations than citizens old enough to vote, i.e., counties where
registration rates exceed 100%. These 378 counties combined had about
2.5 million registrations over the 100%-registered mark.

FEDS CAN SHUT OFF DC CASH OVER BLM-DEFUND THE POLICE STREET PAINTING

I hope you’ve been following our challenge to the District of
Columbia government over it turning a prominent street into leftwing
propaganda.

Here’s the latest. We have filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA)
suit against the U.S. Department of Transportation for records of
communication between the Federal Highway Administration and the
District of Columbia’s Department of Transportation about the
painting of “Black Lives Matter” on and the reopening of 16th
Street NW near the White House in Washington, DC (_Judicial Watch v.
U.S. Department of Transportation_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20579&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG90LWJsbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI2NjcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
(No. 20-cv-02667)).

We sued after the Federal Highway Administration failed to respond to
an August 19, 2020, FOIA request asking for:

* Emails between the Federal Highway Administration and the District
Department of Transportation about the painting of “Black Lives
Matter” on 16th Street, N.W. between H and K Streets, N.W.
* Emails between the Federal Highway Administration and the District
Department of Transportation about the closure of 16th Street, N.W.
between H and K Streets, N.W.
* Records identifying policies or procedures for closing streets
deemed part of the District Evacuation Route.

On September 15, 2020, it was reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20580&F=T&]
that the Federal Highway Administration informed Washington, DC,
officials that it wanted them, “to remove the Black Lives Matter
plaza sign so that part of 16th street in downtown Washington could be
re-opened to traffic.” Further, there is “nothing in writing right
now because no one wants to come down on the side against ... the
Black Lives Matter movement,” and there have been closed door
meetings between the Mayor’s office, the Federal Highway
Administration, and local businesses affected by the road closure.

On June 5, 2020, after days of protests and riots in Washington, DC,
led by the Black Lives Matter movement, a team of artists, residents,
District employees, and demonstrators painted “Black Lives Matter”
and the District’s crest, which resembles three stars above an
“equals” sign, on 16th Street NW. The following day, demonstrators
painted “Defund the Police,” a key demand of the Black Lives
Matter movement, alongside the “Black Lives Matter” message.

On July 1, we filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=19523&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3Vlcy1kYy1wYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDA5MjUyMTUyMDU=]
against
Mayor Bowser and other officials for First Amendment violations over
their refusal to allow Judicial Watch to paint the message “Because
No One Is Above the Law!” on a DC street.

In August, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20064&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmxtLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
against
Bowser, the District of Columbia Department of Transportation and the
District of Columbia Department of Public Works for records about the
painting of “Black Lives Matter” and “Defund the Police” on a
DC street in front of the White House.

DC Mayor Bowser shut down a major street near the White House to make
a political statement for the BLM/Defund the Police agenda. Our
lawsuit highlights how and why federal dollars should not be used to
subsidize this abuse.

NEW YORK TO DOCTORS: HAND OVER PRIVATE PATIENT INFORMATION

The various state government responses to coronavirus have undermined
and, in some cases, shredded our God-given liberties and
constitutional rights. Consider New York Governor Andrew Cuomo’s
latest move, as our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison,
reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20615&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9uZXcteW9yay10by1kb2N0b3JzLWhhbmQtb3Zlci1wcml2YXRlLXBhdGllbnQtaW5mb3JtYXRpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]
in our _Investigative Bulletin_.

Big Brother wants more about you from your doctor—and fast.

Last month, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo ordered health care
professionals across the state to provide the “full residential
address and phone number, occupation and employer name, full work
address and employer phone number as well as race and ethnicity” of
all patients tested for Covid-19.

On Monday, he upped the ante. The new order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20602&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL255cy1oZWFsdGgtYWR2aXNvcmllcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDA5MjUyMTUyMDU=],
obtained by Judicial Watch, mandates that doctors “collect and
report whether a patient attends or works in a school and if so, the
name and location of the school. This includes elementary, secondary,
and post-secondary/higher education. It is also critical to list the
patient’s local address if different from their permanent
address.”

Health care providers must report “within three hours.” Three
hours! The price of non-compliance? “Civil penalties of up to $2,000
per day.”

No mention in the advisory of privacy safeguards or limits on what can
be done with the information. Medical professionals in New York
understand the need for Covid-19 testing, but concerns are mounting
that Cuomo is using a March state of emergency declaration
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=20603&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ292ZXJub3IubnkuZ292L25ld3Mvbm8tMjAyLWRlY2xhcmluZy1kaXNhc3Rlci1lbWVyZ2VuY3ktc3RhdGUtbmV3LXlvcms/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDA5MjUyMTUyMDU=]
to trample patient rights.

Until next week ...

[Contribute]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51546&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAwOTI1MjE1MjA1]

clean_body: Clinton Email Court Battle [INSIDE JW] SUPREME COURT NOMINATION FIGHT [==] We send our condolences to the family of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. She had a wonderful judicial temperament that will always be remembered. President Trump now has a historic opportunity to nominate yet another constitutional conservative who will honor the Constitution and the rule of law across the full spectrum of constitutional issues. And the Senate should move quickly to work with President Trump to consider and approve a new justice who will faithfully apply the U.S. Constitution. There is no reason we cannot have a new justice by Election Day. Regarding the Supreme Court vacancy, my belief is that if Democrats can impeach in an election year, Trump can certainly fill a seat on the Court in an election year. President Trump is set to announce his nomination this weekend. It is important that your share your views about the confirmation battle with your senators at 202-225-3121. Don’t presume any outcome is preordained or that even senators you don’t support won’t be pleased to hear from you! This [] is what I wrote for Fox News. When karma lands, it lands hard. This is the lesson Democrats are now learning with the passing of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, and the reality that President Trump will move forward to fill her seat this week. In years past, Democrats might have had the tools to stop the process in its tracks, or the comity and goodwill to be able to reach a compromise with Senate Republicans or the White House. But they have squandered their goodwill and disarmed their senators, leaving them with little to do but fume and threaten. Democrats say they are angry about the precedent and propriety of a hurry-up nomination process. They invoke Ginsburg’s supposed “dying wish” she “not be replaced until a new president is installed." Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., threatened that “nothing is off the table for next year” if Senate Republicans move the process forward. And Massachusetts Rep. Joe Kennedy III tweeted his contempt for the Supreme Court, saying: “If he holds a vote in 2020, we pack the court in 2021. It’s that simple.” But this is a case of “coup karma.” If the Left can unilaterally impeach and try to remove a president during an election year, a Supreme Court justice can certainly be appointed during an election year. Democrats can hardly stand on principle regarding election year nominations when they were more than willing to engage in a partisan, election-year impeachment fiasco based on a contrived pretext that had no chance of prevailing. The impeachment followed other failed attempts to sabotage Trump – illicit spying, the “insurance policy,” seeking to invoke the 25th Amendment to remove him from office, and the Mueller “witch hunt” investigation that harassed him despite almost everyone in D.C. knowing that there was never any evidence of Russian collusion. After the Mueller fiasco flamed out, Democrats weaponized the whistleblower process to create a fake scandal out of a harmless July 25, 2019, conversation between President Trump and President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine. This became the basis for what George Washington University Law Professor Jonathan Turley called “the shortest proceeding, with the thinnest evidentiary record, and the narrowest grounds ever used to impeach a president.” Recall that the impeachment moved out of the House based on an unprecedented party-line vote! The fact that the coup impeachment was occurring as an election was looming made no impression on Speaker Nancy Pelosi, D-Calif., and her minions, who were eager to leave Trump “impeached forever” (though he was also acquitted forever). Byron York called it “an election-year gambit” using the impeachment as “the most audacious opposition research maneuver of all time.” And Berkeley law professor John Yoo cautioned that the Founding Fathers would have rejected the idea of an election-year impeachment because they “expected that the American people would hold a president accountable for any abuses of power at the ballot box.” So it is ironic to hear Democrats saying that the people should decide who gets to choose the next Supreme Court justice when they were more than willing to deny voters the opportunity to judge President Trump’s fitness for office. Defenders of the election-year impeachment also argued that the timing was valid since the “crimes” under investigation might affect the outcome of the election itself. A similar argument can be made regarding filling Ginsburg’s vacant seat. The Left has hired 600 hundred lawyers for the Biden campaign and intends the Supreme Court to be an active participant in the 2020 election. The stakes going into November are frankly too high to have a Supreme Court not at full strength. Democrats have pushed for a mail-in election that virtually guarantees fraud and chaos and subsequent urgent litigation. They have instructed Democratic nominee Joe Biden not to concede under any circumstances and have threatened violence if they do not win. The country cannot afford to have an eight-member Supreme Court that could deadlock on critical questions coming from these dangerous circumstances. We are staring down the barrel of potentially the greatest constitutional crisis since the Civil War, and we need nine justices on the bench. As then-President Obama tweeted in October 2016, “the need for a ninth justice is undeniably clear.” There is plenty of time. Justice Ginsburg was confirmed only 42 days after she was nominated by President Bill Clinton. President Trump’s nominee should get the same speedy consideration by the Senate. A confirmation vote by Oct. 30 is completely doable. Especially since a cabal of corrupt politicians tried to ram through an election-year impeachment and failed. Again, coup karma. It is absurd to suggest a president whose party controls the Senate should jointly decline to fill a vacant Supreme Court seat – ever. Fill the seat. JUDICIAL WATCH WILL APPEAL DECISION ON CLINTON EMAIL TESTIMONY Anything to keep the full truth about Hillary Clinton’s emails hidden ... The State Department just asked a judge to overturn a court order authorizing additional discovery in our FOIA lawsuit that led directly to the 2015 disclosure of former Secretary of State Hillary Rodham Clinton personal email system. We have now filed our opposition to this latest effort. The State Department’s motion seeks to avoid the depositions of Clinton’s former Chief of Staff Cheryl Mills as well as current and former State Department Information Technology Officials Brett Gittleson and Yvette Jacks. We argue that the State Department is wrong to try to expand an August 2020 appellate court ruling blocking Clinton’s deposition. The ruling did not bar the deposition of Mills or any other witness. We intend to seek further review of the ruling. The lawsuit seeks records about the Obama administration’s public statements regarding the 2012 terrorist attack on the U.S. consulate in Benghazi, Libya. In addition to exposing the Clinton email system, the lawsuit uncovered “talking points” drafted by Obama administration officials demonstrating that then-National Security Advisor Susan Rice’s statements on the eve of the 2012 presidential election were false (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State (No. 1:14-cv-01242)). On December 6, 2018, U.S. District Court Judge Royce Lamberth ordered that Rice and senior Obama State Department officials, lawyers and Clinton aides be deposed or answer written questions under oath in the lawsuit. Judge Lamberth called Clinton’s email system “one of the gravest modern offenses to government transparency.” In May 2019, Rice admitted under oath that she emailed Clinton on Clinton’s personal email account and “in rare instances” received emails related to U.S. government business on her own personal email account. Rice claimed she “took steps” to ensure that official emails were “also on her government email account” but did not identify those steps. Rice’s 2019 sworn answers are available here. On March 2, 2020, Judge Lamberth ordered us to depose Clinton and Mills, under oath, regarding Clinton’s email system and the existence of records about the Benghazi attack. Clinton and Mills filed an emergency mandamus appeal to avoid testifying. It is shameful that we still must battle Hillary Clinton, the DOJ, and the State Department in court over the Clinton email scandal. President Trump should demand answers about these efforts to avoid accountability and the truth. JUDICIAL WATCH IS SUING ILLINOIS FOR REFUSING TO DISCLOSE VOTER ROLL DATA A key issue this year (and, frankly, every year!) is clean voter rolls. Toward this end, we filed a lawsuit against the state of Illinois, the Illinois State Board of Elections, and its director for failing to allow public access to its voter roll data in violation of the federal National Voter Registration Act of 1993 [] (NVRA). State officials refused to allow the non-profit Illinois Conservative Union and three lawfully registered Illinois voters to obtain a copy of the state’s voter registration list, despite their lawful request for those records under federal law. We filed the lawsuit on their behalf in the United States District Court in the Northern District of Illinois (Illinois Conservative Union et al v. Illinois et al. [. 1:20-cv-05542)). Judicial Watch Attorney Robert Popper is the director of our election integrity initiative. We are being assisted by attorney David J. Shestokas of Orland Park, Illinois. Federal law provides that states “shall make available for public inspection and, where available, photocopying at a reasonable cost, all records concerning the implementation of programs and activities conducted for the purpose of ensuring the accuracy and currency of official lists of eligible voters.” On July 24, 2019, the Illinois Conservative Union sent a public records request under this provision to the Illinois State Board of Elections, requesting information about the maintenance of voter rolls, including the most recent voter registration list for Illinois. The request noted that the records “would be used solely for purposes intended by federal law, namely, to ensure the accuracy and currency of the official list of eligible voters,” the complaint said. The State Board of Elections denied the request, claiming that only political committees or governmental bodies may receive copies of records. The State Board did allow a few Illinois Conservative Union members to travel to Springfield, Illinois during working hours and afforded them the opportunity to review Illinois’ millions of voter records one at a time on a computer terminal, with no ability to sort or organize records. By this lawsuit the Illinois Conservative Union seeks meaningful access to the records it requested. As several federal courts have recognized, the public records provisions of the National Voter Registration Act were intended to enhance the ability of private groups to monitor whether states are removing ineligible voters from their voter rolls. In April, a federal court in Maryland noted that organizations “such as Judicial Watch” have “the resources and expertise that few individuals can marshal. By excluding these organizations from access to voter registration lists,” the purpose of the federal law is undermined. That court ordered Maryland [==] to produce complete voter registration records we requested. In Illinois, our research found that 14 out of 102 counties (14% of all counties) have more registered voters than citizens over 18, while Illinois as a whole has 660,000 inactive registrants. So our lawsuit aims to open up Illinois voting records so private groups can tell whether they are dirty. Illinois voters and citizens have a right to review election rolls under federal law and Illinois’ refusal to make them available suggests the state knows the rolls are a mess and won’t stand the light of the day. Thanks to your support, we are a national leader for cleaner elections. Earlier this year, we sued Pennsylvania [] and North Carolina [] for failing to make reasonable efforts to remove ineligible voters from their rolls as required by federal law. The lawsuits allege that the two states have nearly 2 million extra names on voter registration rolls. In 2018, the Supreme Court upheld a voter-roll cleanup program that resulted from a Judicial Watch settlement of a federal lawsuit with Ohio [=]. California settled [=] a National Voter Registration Act lawsuit with us and last year began the process of removing up to 1.6 million inactive names from Los Angeles County’s voter rolls. Kentucky [==] also began a cleanup of hundreds of thousands of old registrations last year after it entered into a consent decree to end another Judicial Watch lawsuit. Our 2019 study found 378 counties nationwide that had more voter registrations than citizens old enough to vote, i.e., counties where registration rates exceed 100%. These 378 counties combined had about 2.5 million registrations over the 100%-registered mark. FEDS CAN SHUT OFF DC CASH OVER BLM-DEFUND THE POLICE STREET PAINTING I hope you’ve been following our challenge to the District of Columbia government over it turning a prominent street into leftwing propaganda. Here’s the latest. We have filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) suit against the U.S. Department of Transportation for records of communication between the Federal Highway Administration and the District of Columbia’s Department of Transportation about the painting of “Black Lives Matter” on and the reopening of 16th Street NW near the White House in Washington, DC (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Transportation [] (No. 20-cv-02667)). We sued after the Federal Highway Administration failed to respond to an August 19, 2020, FOIA request asking for: Emails between the Federal Highway Administration and the District Department of Transportation about the painting of “Black Lives Matter” on 16th Street, N.W. between H and K Streets, N.W. Emails between the Federal Highway Administration and the District Department of Transportation about the closure of 16th Street, N.W. between H and K Streets, N.W. * Records identifying policies or procedures for closing streets deemed part of the District Evacuation Route. On September 15, 2020, it was reported [==] that the Federal Highway Administration informed Washington, DC, officials that it wanted them, “to remove the Black Lives Matter plaza sign so that part of 16th street in downtown Washington could be re-opened to traffic.” Further, there is “nothing in writing right now because no one wants to come down on the side against ... the Black Lives Matter movement,” and there have been closed door meetings between the Mayor’s office, the Federal Highway Administration, and local businesses affected by the road closure. On June 5, 2020, after days of protests and riots in Washington, DC, led by the Black Lives Matter movement, a team of artists, residents, District employees, and demonstrators painted “Black Lives Matter” and the District’s crest, which resembles three stars above an “equals” sign, on 16th Street NW. The following day, demonstrators painted “Defund the Police,” a key demand of the Black Lives Matter movement, alongside the “Black Lives Matter” message. On July 1, we filed a civil rights lawsuit [=] against Mayor Bowser and other officials for First Amendment violations over their refusal to allow Judicial Watch to paint the message “Because No One Is Above the Law!” on a DC street. In August, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against Bowser, the District of Columbia Department of Transportation and the District of Columbia Department of Public Works for records about the painting of “Black Lives Matter” and “Defund the Police” on a DC street in front of the White House. DC Mayor Bowser shut down a major street near the White House to make a political statement for the BLM/Defund the Police agenda. Our lawsuit highlights how and why federal dollars should not be used to subsidize this abuse. NEW YORK TO DOCTORS: HAND OVER PRIVATE PATIENT INFORMATION The various state government responses to coronavirus have undermined and, in some cases, shredded our God-given liberties and constitutional rights. Consider New York Governor Andrew Cuomo’s latest move, as our chief investigative reporter, Micah Morrison, reports [] in our Investigative Bulletin. Big Brother wants more about you from your doctor—and fast. Last month, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo ordered health care professionals across the state to provide the “full residential address and phone number, occupation and employer name, full work address and employer phone number as well as race and ethnicity” of all patients tested for Covid-19. On Monday, he upped the ante. The new order [=], obtained by Judicial Watch, mandates that doctors “collect and report whether a patient attends or works in a school and if so, the name and location of the school. This includes elementary, secondary, and post-secondary/higher education. It is also critical to list the patient’s local address if different from their permanent address.” Health care providers must report “within three hours.” Three hours! The price of non-compliance? “Civil penalties of up to $2,000 per day.” No mention in the advisory of privacy safeguards or limits on what can be done with the information. Medical professionals in New York understand the need for Covid-19 testing, but concerns are mounting that Cuomo is using a March state of emergency declaration [=] to trample patient rights. Until next week ... subject: Trump's nominee to the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
President Trump’s nominee should not be confirmed before the election to preserve our democracy and the rule of law. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b33e47ad67&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Less than a day after Justice Ginsburg passed, Jackie Walorski called for President Trump to nominate Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. This week, Jackie called on Indiana Senators Todd Young and Mike Braun to confirm Amy Coney Barrett without delay.

**[Jackie Walorski’s comments are shamefully hypocritical.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8fb03780e3&e=5886ca081d)** The Republicans refused to consider President Obama’s nominee to the Court when there was a vacancy 10 months before an election. But now they are doing the opposite 39 days before the election _when voting has already started_. This blatant disregard for the democratic process and lack of basic integrity damages our country, the Supreme Court, and Congress.

**[Jackie Walorski’s actions are unconscionable during the Covid-19 pandemic.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=86c5fa966e&e=5886ca081d) **The people of this district continue to fight for their lives and their jobs amidst the worst global health crisis since 1918 and the worst economic disaster since 1929. Congress has not passed a Covid-19 relief bill in six months but now Jackie Walorski is calling on Senators Todd Young and Mike Braun to push through a Supreme Court nomination in less than six weeks. In addition, the Trump administration has filed a lawsuit to strike down the Affordable Care Act, with Supreme Court arguments scheduled for November 10. Jackie Walorski has repeatedly and intentionally voted to repeal the ACA. If they succeed, millions of people could be without health insurance at a time they need it the most. This is a callous disregard for human life.

[No nominee should be confirmed before the election.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=4e35070e45&e=5886ca081d) The Supreme Court could be called upon to decide the result of this election itself. President Trump’s nominee should not be confirmed before the election to preserve our democracy and the rule of law.

[**Please help me fight for the integrity of the Supreme Court and our democracy.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3fb2a464f0&e=5886ca081d)

body:
McConnell and Perdue are violating their own principles. |
---
Friend,

Earlier this week, we emailed you about Mitch McConnell and David Perdue **violating their own principles** by declaring support for jamming a Supreme Court confirmation through, _even though the Election is already underway._

They've since doubled down on their position to support Donald Trump's eventual nominee -- **_even though Trump hasn't even announced the nominee yet!!_**

**But we have, in writing, a letter co-signed by David Perdue indicating his position on this exact same issue back in 2016.**

**[We want to show you the key parts of the letter, but before we do, can you chip in $20 to help elect Jon Ossoff and get Georgia's lying Senator out of office?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f80/5b2c1286/3afbc049/25f3b6c5/2346806684/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_scotus_letter?refcode=em_2020_09_25_scotus_letter&amount=20")**
